  541|       |#[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  542|       |#[derive(Debug, PartialEq, Eq)]
  543|       |enum MermaidEnqueueError {
  544|       |    QueueFull,
  545|       |    Disconnected,
  546|       |}
  547|       |
  548|       |/// Per-diagram debounce state for resize-aware rendering.
  549|       |/// Tracks the last-enqueued width bucket and the time when the width bucket last changed.
  550|       |#[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  551|       |struct WidthDebounce {
  552|       |    /// The width bucket for which a render was last successfully enqueued.
  553|       |    last_enqueued_bucket: u32,
  554|       |    /// The width bucket observed on the most recent frame.
  555|       |    /// Used to detect continuing resize (trailing-edge timer reset).
  556|       |    last_seen_bucket: u32,
  557|       |    /// When the width bucket last changed (i.e., last_seen_bucket was updated).
  558|       |    /// None if the current bucket matches last_enqueued_bucket (no resize in progress).
  559|       |    bucket_changed_at: Option<Instant>,
  560|       |}
  561|       |
  562|       |/// How long to wait after the last width bucket change before
  563|       |/// enqueueing a re-render. Prevents flooding workers during resize.
  564|       |#[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  565|       |const MERMAID_RESIZE_DEBOUNCE_MS: u64 = 150;
  566|       |
  567|       |pub(crate) struct MermaidRenderer {
  568|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  569|       |    mermaid_textures: RefCell<TextureCache>,
  570|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  571|       |    mermaid_pending: RefCell<HashSet<String>>,
  572|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  573|       |    mermaid_frame_pending: Cell<bool>,
  574|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  575|       |    mermaid_svg_cache: RefCell<SvgCache>,
  576|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  577|       |    mermaid_errors: RefCell<LruCache<u64, String>>,
  578|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  579|       |    mermaid_texture_errors: RefCell<LruCache<String, String>>,
  580|       |    /// Job sender wrapped in Option so Drop can take and drop it first,
  581|       |    /// closing the channel before joining worker threads.
  582|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  583|       |    mermaid_job_tx: Option<MermaidJobSender>,
  584|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  585|       |    mermaid_result_rx: MermaidResultReceiver,
  586|       |    /// Worker thread handles for cleanup on drop.
  587|       |    /// When MermaidRenderer is dropped, we join all worker threads to ensure
  588|       |    /// they exit cleanly and release memory (font database, QuickJS runtime).
  589|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  590|       |    worker_handles: RefCell<Vec<JoinHandle<()>>>,
  591|       |    /// Deferred worker spawn: holds channel ends until the first diagram is requested.
  592|       |    /// Avoids loading QuickJS + mermaid.min.js when no Mermaid diagrams are used.
  593|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  594|       |    deferred_spawn: RefCell<Option<(MermaidJobReceiver, MermaidResultSender)>>,
  595|       |    /// Per-diagram debounce state for resize-aware rendering.
  596|       |    /// Key: svg_key (u64). Tracks the last-enqueued width bucket
  597|       |    /// and the time when the width bucket last changed.
  598|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  599|       |    mermaid_width_debounce: RefCell<HashMap<u64, WidthDebounce>>,
  600|       |    /// Maps svg_key ? the texture_key of the most recently stored texture.
  601|       |    /// Used during resize debounce to find a stale-but-displayable texture.
  602|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  603|       |    mermaid_latest_texture: RefCell<HashMap<u64, String>>,
  604|       |    /// The width bucket that was most recently *requested* for each svg_key.
  605|       |    /// Updated every frame in render_block before poll_mermaid_results.
  606|       |    /// Used by poll_mermaid_results to detect stale results.
  607|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  608|       |    mermaid_wanted_bucket: RefCell<HashMap<u64, u32>>,
  609|       |}
  610|       |
  611|       |impl MermaidRenderer {
  612|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  613|       |    const MERMAID_TEXTURE_CACHE_CAPACITY: usize = 128;
  614|       |    /// Maximum total bytes for texture cache (100MB). Textures at 4096x4096 are 64MB each,
  615|       |    /// so this comfortably holds several full-res diagrams. Size limit ensures bounded memory.
  616|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  617|       |    const MERMAID_TEXTURE_CACHE_MAX_BYTES: usize = 100 * 1024 * 1024;
  618|       |    #[cfg(any(test, feature = "mermaid-quickjs"))]
  619|       |    const MERMAID_WIDTH_BUCKET_STEP: u32 = 32;
  620|       |    #[cfg(any(test, feature = "mermaid-quickjs"))]
  621|       |    const MERMAID_SCALE_BUCKET_FACTOR: f32 = 100.0;
  622|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  623|       |    const MAX_MERMAID_JOBS: usize = 4;
  624|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  625|       |    const MERMAID_SVG_CACHE_CAPACITY: usize = 64;
  626|       |    /// Maximum total bytes for SVG cache (100MB). Large SVGs (100KB-10MB each)
  627|       |    /// could use 640MB at 64 entries. Size limit ensures bounded memory usage.
  628|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  629|       |    const MERMAID_SVG_CACHE_MAX_BYTES: usize = 100 * 1024 * 1024;
  630|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  631|       |    const MERMAID_ERROR_CACHE_CAPACITY: usize = 64;
  632|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  633|       |    const MERMAID_TEXTURE_ERROR_CACHE_CAPACITY: usize = 64;
  634|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  635|       |    const MERMAID_MAX_TEXT_SIZE: u32 = 50_000;
  636|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  637|       |    const MERMAID_MAX_RENDER_SIDE: u32 = 4096;
  638|       |    /// Minimum height for Mermaid placeholder to reduce layout shift when diagrams render.
  639|       |    /// Most Mermaid diagrams are 150-400px tall; using 200px as a reasonable middle ground.
  640|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  641|       |    const MERMAID_PLACEHOLDER_MIN_HEIGHT: f32 = 200.0;
  642|       |
  643|    457|    pub(crate) fn new() -> Self {
  644|       |        #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  645|    457|        let (mermaid_job_tx, mermaid_job_rx): (MermaidJobSender, MermaidJobReceiver) =
  646|    457|            bounded(Self::MAX_MERMAID_JOBS * 4);
  647|       |        #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
  648|    457|        let (mermaid_result_tx, mermaid_result_rx): (
  649|    457|            MermaidResultSender,
  650|    457|            MermaidResultReceiver,
  651|    457|        ) = bounded(Self::MAX_MERMAID_JOBS * 4);
  652|    457|        Self {
  653|    457|            #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]

 1275|      7|    fn spawn_mermaid_worker_thread(
 1276|      7|        worker_idx: usize,
 1277|      7|        worker_rx: MermaidJobReceiver,
 1278|      7|        worker_tx: MermaidResultSender,
 1279|      7|        worker_fontdb: Arc<usvg::fontdb::Database>,
 1280|      7|    ) -> std::io::Result<JoinHandle<()>> {
 1281|       |        #[cfg(test)]
 1282|      7|        if FORCE_MERMAID_THREAD_SPAWN_ERROR.swap(false, Ordering::Relaxed) {
  ------------------
  |  Branch (1282:12): [True: 1, False: 6]
  ------------------
 1283|      1|            return Err(std::io::Error::other("forced mermaid spawn error"));
 1284|      6|        }
 1285|      6|        std::thread::Builder::new()
 1286|      6|            .name(format!("mdmdview-mermaid-{worker_idx}"))
 1287|      6|            .spawn(move || {
 1288|      6|                let mut worker = MermaidWorker::new(worker_idx, worker_fontdb).map_err(|e| {
                                                                                                         ^1
 1289|      1|                    eprintln!("Mermaid worker init failed: {}", e);
 1290|      1|                    e
 1291|      1|                });
 1292|      6|                for job in worker_rx.iter() {
 1293|      6|                    let payload = match &mut worker {
 1294|      5|                        Ok(state) => state.process_job(job),
 1295|      1|                        Err(err) => {
 1296|       |                            let MermaidRequest {
 1297|      1|                                svg_key,
 1298|      1|                                texture_key,
 1299|      1|                                svg,
 1300|       |                                ..
 1301|      1|                            } = job;
 1302|      1|                            MermaidResult {
 1303|      1|                                svg_key,
 1304|      1|                                texture_key,
 1305|      1|                                svg,
 1306|      1|                                rgba: None,
 1307|      1|                                size: None,
 1308|      1|                                error: Some(err.clone()),
 1309|      1|                            }
 1310|       |                        }
 1311|       |                    };
 1312|       |                    // Use try_send to avoid blocking if result channel is full.
 1313|       |                    // This prevents deadlock during shutdown: if Drop joins workers
 1314|       |                    // while they're blocked on send (because result_rx isn't being
 1315|       |                    // polled), we'd hang forever. Dropping results is acceptable
 1316|       |                    // since we're shutting down anyway.
 1317|      6|                    let _ = worker_tx.try_send(payload);
 1318|       |                }
 1319|      6|            })
 1320|      7|    }

 1324|      7|        job_rx: MermaidJobReceiver,
 1325|      7|        result_tx: MermaidResultSender,
 1326|      7|    ) -> Vec<JoinHandle<()>> {
 1327|      7|        let worker_count = Self::mermaid_worker_count();

 1329|      7|        fontdb.load_system_fonts();

 1331|      7|        let mut handles = Vec::with_capacity(worker_count);
 1332|      7|        for worker_idx in 0..worker_count {
 1333|      7|            let worker_rx = job_rx.clone();
 1334|      7|            let worker_tx = result_tx.clone();
 1335|      7|            let worker_fontdb = Arc::clone(&fontdb);
 1336|      7|            match Self::spawn_mermaid_worker_thread(worker_idx, worker_rx, worker_tx, worker_fontdb)
 1337|       |            {
 1338|      6|                Ok(handle) => handles.push(handle),
 1339|      1|                Err(err) => eprintln!("Failed to start Mermaid worker thread: {}", err),
 1340|       |            }
 1341|       |        }
 1342|      7|        drop(job_rx);

 1344|      7|    }

 1462|       |
 1463|       |#[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 1464|       |impl Drop for MermaidRenderer {
 1465|    482|    fn drop(&mut self) {
 1466|       |        // First, drop the job sender to close the channel.
 1467|       |        // This signals workers to exit their `for job in worker_rx.iter()` loop.
 1468|    482|        drop(self.mermaid_job_tx.take());

 2923|       |function __mdmdview_parse_font_size(value, baseSize) {
 2924|       |  if (value === null || value === undefined) { return baseSize; }
 2925|       |  var raw = String(value).trim();
 2926|       |  if (!raw) { return baseSize; }
 2927|       |  var num = parseFloat(raw);
 2928|       |  if (isNaN(num)) { return baseSize; }
 2929|       |  if (raw.indexOf('em') >= 0) {
 2930|       |    var base = baseSize || 16;
 2931|       |    return num * base;
 2932|       |  }
 2933|       |  if (raw.indexOf('ex') >= 0) {
 2934|       |    var baseEx = baseSize || 16;
 2935|       |    return num * baseEx * 0.5;
 2936|       |  }
 2937|       |  return num;
 2938|       |}
 2939|       |function __mdmdview_parse_font_weight_value(value) {
 2940|       |  if (value === null || value === undefined) { return null; }
 2941|       |  var raw = String(value).trim().toLowerCase();
 2942|       |  if (!raw) { return null; }
 2943|       |  if (raw === 'normal') { return 400; }
 2944|       |  if (raw === 'bold' || raw === 'bolder') { return 700; }
 2945|       |  if (raw === 'lighter') { return 300; }
 2946|       |  var num = parseFloat(raw);
 2947|       |  if (isNaN(num)) { return null; }
 2948|       |  return num;
 2949|       |}
 2950|       |function __mdmdview_parse_css_font_sizes(cssText, cache) {
 2951|       |  if (!cssText || !cache) { return; }

 2953|       |  for (var i = 0; i < chunks.length; i++) {
 2954|       |    var rule = chunks[i];

 2956|       |    if (parts.length < 2) { continue; }
 2957|       |    var selector = parts[0];
 2958|       |    var body = parts.slice(1).join('{');
 2959|       |    if (!selector || !body) { continue; }

 2961|       |    if (!sizeMatch) { continue; }

 2974|       |      if (!cache[cls] || cache[cls] < size) {
 2975|       |        cache[cls] = size;
 2976|       |      }
 2977|       |    }
 2978|       |  }

 3231|       |function __mdmdview_parse_length(value, fontSize) {

 3236|       |  if (isNaN(num)) { return 0; }

 3238|       |    return num * (fontSize || 16);
 3239|       |  }

 3241|       |    return num * (fontSize || 16) * 0.5;

 3249|       |function __mdmdview_path_points(el) {
 3250|       |  var d = el && el.getAttribute ? el.getAttribute('d') : null;
 3251|       |  if (!d) { return []; }
 3252|       |  var nums = String(d).match(/-?\d*\.?\d+(?:e[-+]?\d+)?/ig);
 3253|       |  if (!nums || nums.length < 2) { return []; }
 3254|       |  var points = [];
 3255|       |  for (var i = 0; i + 1 < nums.length; i += 2) {
 3256|       |    var x = __mdmdview_parse_num(nums[i]);
 3257|       |    var y = __mdmdview_parse_num(nums[i + 1]);
 3258|       |    points.push(__mdmdview_transform_point(el, x, y));
 3259|       |  }
 3260|       |  return points;

 3262|       |function __mdmdview_path_total_length(el) {
 3263|       |  var points = __mdmdview_path_points(el);
 3264|       |  if (points.length < 2) { return 0; }
 3265|       |  var total = 0;
 3266|       |  for (var i = 1; i < points.length; i++) {
 3267|       |    var dx = points[i].x - points[i - 1].x;
 3268|       |    var dy = points[i].y - points[i - 1].y;
 3269|       |    total += Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
 3270|       |  }
 3271|       |  return total;
 3272|       |}
 3273|       |function __mdmdview_path_point_at_length(el, length) {
 3274|       |  var points = __mdmdview_path_points(el);
 3275|       |  if (!points.length) { return { x: 0, y: 0 }; }
 3276|       |  if (points.length === 1) { return points[0]; }
 3277|       |  var remaining = Math.max(0, __mdmdview_parse_num(length));
 3278|       |  for (var i = 1; i < points.length; i++) {
 3279|       |    var p0 = points[i - 1];
 3280|       |    var p1 = points[i];
 3281|       |    var dx = p1.x - p0.x;
 3282|       |    var dy = p1.y - p0.y;
 3283|       |    var seg = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
 3284|       |    if (seg <= 0) { continue; }
 3285|       |    if (remaining <= seg) {
 3286|       |      var t = remaining / seg;
 3287|       |      return { x: p0.x + dx * t, y: p0.y + dy * t };
 3288|       |    }
 3289|       |    remaining -= seg;
 3290|       |  }
 3291|       |  return points[points.length - 1];

 3293|       |function __mdmdview_text_metrics(el) {
 3294|       |  var size = __mdmdview_get_font_size(el);
 3295|       |  var weight = __mdmdview_get_font_weight(el);
 3296|       |  if (!el || !el.children || !el.children.length) {
 3297|       |    var raw = el ? __mdmdview_collect_text(el) : '';
 3298|       |    return __mdmdview_measure_text(raw, size, weight);
 3299|       |  }
 3300|       |  var max_w = 0;
 3301|       |  var max_h = 0;
 3302|       |  var lines = 0;
 3303|       |  for (var i = 0; i < el.children.length; i++) {
 3304|       |    var child = el.children[i];
 3305|       |    var tag = (child.tagName || '').toLowerCase();
 3306|       |    if (tag !== 'tspan') { continue; }
 3307|       |    var text = __mdmdview_collect_text(child);
 3308|       |    if (!text || !String(text).trim()) { continue; }
 3309|       |    var child_weight = __mdmdview_get_font_weight(child);
 3310|       |    var m = __mdmdview_measure_text(text, size, child_weight);
 3311|       |    if (m.width > max_w) { max_w = m.width; }
 3312|       |    if (m.height > max_h) { max_h = m.height; }
 3313|       |    lines += 1;
 3314|       |  }
 3315|       |  if (!lines) {
 3316|       |    var fallback = __mdmdview_collect_text(el);
 3317|       |    return __mdmdview_measure_text(fallback, size, weight);
 3318|       |  }
 3319|       |  var line_height = max_h > 0 ? max_h : size * 1.2;
 3320|       |  return { width: max_w, height: lines * line_height };
 3321|       |}
 3322|       |function __mdmdview_apply_matrix(bbox, a, b, c, d, e, f) {
 3323|       |  if (!bbox) { return bbox; }
 3324|       |  var x = bbox.x;
 3325|       |  var y = bbox.y;
 3326|       |  var w = bbox.width;
 3327|       |  var h = bbox.height;
 3328|       |  var pts = [
 3329|       |    [x, y],
 3330|       |    [x + w, y],
 3331|       |    [x, y + h],
 3332|       |    [x + w, y + h]
 3333|       |  ];
 3334|       |  var min_x = Infinity;
 3335|       |  var min_y = Infinity;
 3336|       |  var max_x = -Infinity;
 3337|       |  var max_y = -Infinity;
 3338|       |  for (var i = 0; i < pts.length; i++) {
 3339|       |    var px = pts[i][0];
 3340|       |    var py = pts[i][1];
 3341|       |    var nx = a * px + c * py + e;
 3342|       |    var ny = b * px + d * py + f;
 3343|       |    if (nx < min_x) { min_x = nx; }
 3344|       |    if (ny < min_y) { min_y = ny; }
 3345|       |    if (nx > max_x) { max_x = nx; }
 3346|       |    if (ny > max_y) { max_y = ny; }
 3347|       |  }
 3348|       |  if (!isFinite(min_x) || !isFinite(min_y) || !isFinite(max_x) || !isFinite(max_y)) {
 3349|       |    return bbox;
 3350|       |  }
 3351|       |  return { x: min_x, y: min_y, width: max_x - min_x, height: max_y - min_y };
 3352|       |}
 3353|       |function __mdmdview_apply_transform(el, bbox) {
 3354|       |  if (!el || !bbox) { return bbox; }
 3355|       |  var transform = el.getAttribute ? el.getAttribute('transform') : null;
 3356|       |  if (!transform) { return bbox; }
 3357|       |  var current = bbox;
 3358|       |  var re = /([a-zA-Z]+)\(([^)]+)\)/g;
 3359|       |  var match = null;
 3360|       |  while ((match = re.exec(String(transform))) !== null) {
 3361|       |    var name = match[1].toLowerCase();
 3362|       |    var params = match[2].split(/[, ]+/).filter(function(p) { return p.length; });
 3363|       |    var nums = [];
 3364|       |    for (var i = 0; i < params.length; i++) {
 3365|       |      nums.push(__mdmdview_parse_num(params[i]));
 3366|       |    }
 3367|       |    if (name === 'translate') {
 3368|       |      var tx = nums.length ? nums[0] : 0;
 3369|       |      var ty = nums.length > 1 ? nums[1] : 0;
 3370|       |      current = __mdmdview_apply_matrix(current, 1, 0, 0, 1, tx, ty);
 3371|       |    } else if (name === 'scale') {
 3372|       |      var sx = nums.length ? nums[0] : 1;
 3373|       |      var sy = nums.length > 1 ? nums[1] : sx;
 3374|       |      current = __mdmdview_apply_matrix(current, sx, 0, 0, sy, 0, 0);
 3375|       |    } else if (name === 'matrix' && nums.length >= 6) {
 3376|       |      current = __mdmdview_apply_matrix(
 3377|       |        current,
 3378|       |        nums[0],
 3379|       |        nums[1],
 3380|       |        nums[2],
 3381|       |        nums[3],
 3382|       |        nums[4],
 3383|       |        nums[5]
 3384|       |      );
 3385|       |    } else if (name === 'rotate' && nums.length) {
 3386|       |      var angle = nums[0] * Math.PI / 180.0;
 3387|       |      var cos = Math.cos(angle);
 3388|       |      var sin = Math.sin(angle);
 3389|       |      if (nums.length >= 3) {
 3390|       |        var cx = nums[1];
 3391|       |        var cy = nums[2];
 3392|       |        current = __mdmdview_apply_matrix(current, 1, 0, 0, 1, -cx, -cy);
 3393|       |        current = __mdmdview_apply_matrix(current, cos, sin, -sin, cos, 0, 0);
 3394|       |        current = __mdmdview_apply_matrix(current, 1, 0, 0, 1, cx, cy);
 3395|       |      } else {
 3396|       |        current = __mdmdview_apply_matrix(current, cos, sin, -sin, cos, 0, 0);
 3397|       |      }
 3398|       |    } else if (name === 'skewx' && nums.length) {
 3399|       |      var ax = nums[0] * Math.PI / 180.0;
 3400|       |      current = __mdmdview_apply_matrix(current, 1, 0, Math.tan(ax), 1, 0, 0);
 3401|       |    } else if (name === 'skewy' && nums.length) {
 3402|       |      var ay = nums[0] * Math.PI / 180.0;
 3403|       |      current = __mdmdview_apply_matrix(current, 1, Math.tan(ay), 0, 1, 0, 0);
 3404|       |    }
 3405|       |  }
 3406|       |  return current;
 3407|       |}
 3408|       |function __mdmdview_children_bounds(el) {
 3409|       |  if (!el || !el.children || !el.children.length) { return null; }
 3410|       |  var min_x = Infinity;
 3411|       |  var min_y = Infinity;
 3412|       |  var max_x = -Infinity;
 3413|       |  var max_y = -Infinity;
 3414|       |  for (var i = 0; i < el.children.length; i++) {
 3415|       |    var child_box = __mdmdview_bbox(el.children[i]);
 3416|       |    if (!child_box) { continue; }
 3417|       |    if (!isFinite(child_box.width) || !isFinite(child_box.height)) { continue; }
 3418|       |    if (child_box.width <= 0 && child_box.height <= 0) { continue; }
 3419|       |    if (child_box.x < min_x) { min_x = child_box.x; }
 3420|       |    if (child_box.y < min_y) { min_y = child_box.y; }
 3421|       |    if (child_box.x + child_box.width > max_x) { max_x = child_box.x + child_box.width; }
 3422|       |    if (child_box.y + child_box.height > max_y) { max_y = child_box.y + child_box.height; }
 3423|       |  }
 3424|       |  if (isFinite(min_x) && isFinite(min_y) && isFinite(max_x) && isFinite(max_y)) {
 3425|       |    return { x: min_x, y: min_y, width: max_x - min_x, height: max_y - min_y };
 3426|       |  }
 3427|       |  return null;
 3428|       |}
 3429|       |function __mdmdview_cache_bbox(el, box) {
 3430|       |  if (el && box) {
 3431|       |    el.__mdmdview_bbox_cache = box;

 3693|       |function __mdmdview_style_text(style) {
 3694|       |  if (!style) { return ''; }
 3695|       |  if (typeof style.cssText === 'string' && style.cssText.trim().length) {
 3696|       |    return style.cssText;
 3697|       |  }

 3700|       |    if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(style, key)) { continue; }
 3701|       |    if (key === 'cssText') { continue; }
 3702|       |    var val = style[key];

 3705|       |    parts.push(key + ':' + String(val));

 3755|       |function __mdmdview_order_children(node) {

 3757|       |    return node && node.children ? node.children : [];

 3764|       |    if (__mdmdview_is_labelish(node.children[i])) { has_label = true; break; }
 3765|       |  }

 3770|       |    var child = node.children[j];

 3772|       |    else { before.push(child); }
 3773|       |  }

 3775|       |  return before.concat(after);

 3777|       |function __mdmdview_serialize_attrs(node) {

 3796|       |function __mdmdview_serialize(node) {
 3797|       |  if (!node) { return ''; }
 3798|       |  if (node.tagName === '#text') {
 3799|       |    return __mdmdview_escape_text(node.textContent || '');
 3800|       |  }
 3801|       |  var tag = node.tagName || '';

 3803|       |  var content = '';
 3804|       |  var lower = String(tag).toLowerCase();
 3805|       |  // Check if this is an xhtml element (e.g., div inside foreignObject)
 3806|       |  var isXhtml = node.namespaceURI && node.namespaceURI.indexOf('xhtml') >= 0;
 3807|       |  if (node.children && node.children.length) {
 3808|       |    if (lower === 'style' || lower === 'script') {
 3809|       |      content = __mdmdview_collect_text(node);
 3810|       |    } else {
 3811|       |      var ordered = __mdmdview_order_children(node);
 3812|       |      for (var i = 0; i < ordered.length; i++) {
 3813|       |        content += __mdmdview_serialize(ordered[i]);
 3814|       |      }
 3815|       |    }
 3816|       |  } else if (node.__rawInnerHTML && isXhtml) {
 3817|       |    // For xhtml elements with raw innerHTML, escape & but preserve HTML tags
 3818|       |    // Only escape & that aren't already part of entity references like &amp; &lt; etc.
 3819|       |    content = node.__rawInnerHTML.replace(/&(?!(amp|lt|gt|quot|apos|#\d+|#x[0-9a-fA-F]+);)/g, '&amp;');
 3820|       |  } else if (node.textContent) {
 3821|       |    if (lower === 'style' || lower === 'script') {
 3822|       |      content = node.textContent;
 3823|       |    } else {
 3824|       |      content = __mdmdview_escape_text(node.textContent);
 3825|       |    }
 3826|       |  }

 3838|       |function __mdmdview_make_style() {
 3839|       |  var style = { cssText: '' };
 3840|       |  style.setProperty = function(key, value) { style[key] = String(value); };
 3841|       |  style.removeProperty = function(key) { delete style[key]; };

 3843|       |    return Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(style, key) ? style[key] : '';

 3847|       |function __mdmdview_detach(child) {
 3848|       |  if (!child || typeof child !== 'object') { return; }
 3849|       |  var parent = child.parentNode;
 3850|       |  if (!parent || !parent.children) { return; }
 3851|       |  var idx = parent.children.indexOf(child);
 3852|       |  if (idx >= 0) {
 3853|       |    parent.children.splice(idx, 1);
 3854|       |    parent.childNodes = parent.children;
 3855|       |    parent.firstChild = parent.children[0] || null;
 3856|       |  }

 3859|       |function __mdmdview_parse_font_px(font) {

 3863|       |    var value = parseFloat(match[1]);
 3864|       |    if (!isNaN(value)) { return value; }

 3916|       |function __mdmdview_mindmap_get_size(node) {
 3917|       |  var data = node && typeof node.data === 'function' ? node.data() : null;
 3918|       |  var w = data && data.width !== undefined ? Number(data.width) : 80;
 3919|       |  var h = data && data.height !== undefined ? Number(data.height) : 40;
 3920|       |  if (!isFinite(w) || w <= 0) { w = 80; }
 3921|       |  if (!isFinite(h) || h <= 0) { h = 40; }
 3922|       |  return { w: w, h: h };

 3924|       |function __mdmdview_rect_intersection(hw, hh, ux, uy) {
 3925|       |  var ax = Math.abs(ux);
 3926|       |  var ay = Math.abs(uy);
 3927|       |  var dx = ax > 1e-6 ? hw / ax : Infinity;
 3928|       |  var dy = ay > 1e-6 ? hh / ay : Infinity;
 3929|       |  var dist = Math.min(dx, dy);
 3930|       |  if (!isFinite(dist) || dist <= 0) { dist = Math.max(hw, hh); }
 3931|       |  return dist;
 3932|       |}
 3933|       |function __mdmdview_mindmap_collect(nodes, edges) {
 3934|       |  var node_map = {};
 3935|       |  var parents = {};
 3936|       |  var children = {};
 3937|       |  var root = null;
 3938|       |  var root_id = null;
 3939|       |  for (var i = 0; i < nodes.length; i++) {
 3940|       |    var node = nodes[i];
 3941|       |    if (!node || typeof node.data !== 'function') { continue; }
 3942|       |    var data = node.data();
 3943|       |    if (!data) { continue; }
 3944|       |    var id = data.id !== undefined ? String(data.id) : null;
 3945|       |    if (id === null) { continue; }
 3946|       |    node_map[id] = node;
 3947|       |  }
 3948|       |  for (var j = 0; j < edges.length; j++) {
 3949|       |    var edge = edges[j];
 3950|       |    if (!edge || typeof edge.data !== 'function') { continue; }
 3951|       |    var ed = edge.data();
 3952|       |    if (!ed) { continue; }
 3953|       |    var source = ed.source !== undefined ? String(ed.source) : null;
 3954|       |    var target = ed.target !== undefined ? String(ed.target) : null;
 3955|       |    if (!source || !target) { continue; }
 3956|       |    if (!children[source]) { children[source] = []; }
 3957|       |    children[source].push(target);
 3958|       |    parents[target] = source;
 3959|       |  }
 3960|       |  for (var key in node_map) {
 3961|       |    if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(node_map, key)) { continue; }
 3962|       |    if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(parents, key)) {
 3963|       |      root = node_map[key];
 3964|       |      root_id = key;
 3965|       |      break;
 3966|       |    }
 3967|       |  }
 3968|       |  if (!root && nodes.length) {
 3969|       |    root = nodes[0];
 3970|       |    if (root && typeof root.data === 'function') {
 3971|       |      var rd = root.data();
 3972|       |      if (rd && rd.id !== undefined) { root_id = String(rd.id); }
 3973|       |    }
 3974|       |  }
 3975|       |  return { node_map: node_map, children: children, parents: parents, root: root, root_id: root_id };
 3976|       |}
 3977|       |function __mdmdview_mindmap_sorted_children(node_id, tree) {
 3978|       |  var kids = tree.children[node_id] || [];
 3979|       |  return kids.slice();
 3980|       |}
 3981|       |function __mdmdview_mindmap_assign_sides(tree) {
 3982|       |  var sides = {};
 3983|       |  var root_id = tree.root_id;
 3984|       |  if (!root_id) { return sides; }
 3985|       |  sides[root_id] = 0;
 3986|       |  function assign(node_id) {
 3987|       |    var kids = __mdmdview_mindmap_sorted_children(node_id, tree);
 3988|       |    for (var i = 0; i < kids.length; i++) {
 3989|       |      var child_id = kids[i];
 3990|       |      var child_node = tree.node_map[child_id];
 3991|       |      var side = sides[node_id];
 3992|       |      if (node_id === root_id) {
 3993|       |        var data = child_node && typeof child_node.data === 'function' ? child_node.data() : null;
 3994|       |        var section = data && data.section !== undefined ? Number(data.section) : i;
 3995|       |        if (!isFinite(section)) { section = i; }
 3996|       |        side = (section % 2 === 0) ? -1 : 1;
 3997|       |      }
 3998|       |      sides[child_id] = side;
 3999|       |      assign(child_id);
 4000|       |    }
 4001|       |  }
 4002|       |  assign(root_id);
 4003|       |  return sides;
 4004|       |}
 4005|       |function __mdmdview_mindmap_subtree_height(node_id, tree, sizes, gap, heights) {
 4006|       |  var kids = __mdmdview_mindmap_sorted_children(node_id, tree);
 4007|       |  if (!kids.length) {
 4008|       |    heights[node_id] = sizes[node_id].h;
 4009|       |    return heights[node_id];
 4010|       |  }
 4011|       |  var total = 0;
 4012|       |  for (var i = 0; i < kids.length; i++) {
 4013|       |    total += __mdmdview_mindmap_subtree_height(kids[i], tree, sizes, gap, heights);
 4014|       |  }
 4015|       |  total += gap * Math.max(0, kids.length - 1);
 4016|       |  var base = sizes[node_id].h;
 4017|       |  heights[node_id] = total > base ? total : base;
 4018|       |  return heights[node_id];

 4020|       |function __mdmdview_mindmap_layout(nodes, edges) {
 4021|       |  var tree = __mdmdview_mindmap_collect(nodes, edges);
 4022|       |  if (!tree.root || !tree.root_id) { return; }
 4023|       |  var sizes = {};
 4024|       |  for (var key in tree.node_map) {
 4025|       |    if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(tree.node_map, key)) { continue; }
 4026|       |    sizes[key] = __mdmdview_mindmap_get_size(tree.node_map[key]);
 4027|       |  }
 4028|       |  var sides = __mdmdview_mindmap_assign_sides(tree);
 4029|       |  var pad = 10;
 4030|       |  var root_data = tree.root && typeof tree.root.data === 'function' ? tree.root.data() : null;
 4031|       |  if (root_data && root_data.padding !== undefined) {
 4032|       |    var p = Number(root_data.padding);
 4033|       |    if (isFinite(p) && p > 0) { pad = p; }
 4034|       |  }
 4035|       |  var gap_x = Math.max(24, pad * 2.2);
 4036|       |  var positions = {};
 4037|       |  positions[tree.root_id] = { x: 0, y: 0 };
 4038|       |  var angles = {};
 4039|       |  angles[tree.root_id] = 0;
 4040|       |  var deg = Math.PI / 180;
 4041|       |  var left_start = 245 * deg;
 4042|       |  var left_end = 122 * deg;
 4043|       |  var right_start = 345 * deg;
 4044|       |  var right_end = 353 * deg;
 4045|       |  function assign_even(children, start, end) {
 4046|       |    if (!children.length) { return; }
 4047|       |    if (children.length === 1) {
 4048|       |      angles[children[0]] = (start + end) / 2;
 4049|       |      return;
 4050|       |    }
 4051|       |    var span = end - start;
 4052|       |    var step = span / (children.length - 1);
 4053|       |    for (var i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {
 4054|       |      angles[children[i]] = start + step * i;
 4055|       |    }
 4056|       |  }
 4057|       |  var root_kids = __mdmdview_mindmap_sorted_children(tree.root_id, tree);
 4058|       |  var left = [];
 4059|       |  var right = [];
 4060|       |  for (var rk = 0; rk < root_kids.length; rk++) {
 4061|       |    var kid = root_kids[rk];
 4062|       |    var side = sides[kid] || 1;
 4063|       |    if (side < 0) { left.push(kid); } else { right.push(kid); }
 4064|       |  }
 4065|       |  assign_even(left, left_start, left_end);
 4066|       |  assign_even(right, right_start, right_end);
 4067|       |  function spread_for_depth(depth, parent_angle) {
 4068|       |    var base = 38 * deg;
 4069|       |    var cos = Math.cos(parent_angle || 0);
 4070|       |    var bias = cos < 0 ? 1.4 : 1.0;
 4071|       |    var depth_factor = 1 + Math.max(0, depth - 1) * 0.2;
 4072|       |    return (base * bias) / depth_factor;
 4073|       |  }
 4074|       |  function assign_child_angles(node_id, depth) {
 4075|       |    var kids = __mdmdview_mindmap_sorted_children(node_id, tree);
 4076|       |    if (!kids.length) { return; }
 4077|       |    var parent_angle = angles[node_id] || 0;
 4078|       |    if (kids.length === 1) {
 4079|       |      var sin = Math.sin(parent_angle);
 4080|       |      var cos = Math.cos(parent_angle);
 4081|       |      var offset = 0;
 4082|       |      if (cos < -0.1 && sin < -0.1) { offset = 20 * deg; }
 4083|       |      angles[kids[0]] = parent_angle + offset;
 4084|       |      assign_child_angles(kids[0], depth + 1);
 4085|       |      return;
 4086|       |    }
 4087|       |    var spread = spread_for_depth(depth, parent_angle);
 4088|       |    var upper = 1.3;
 4089|       |    var lower = 0.9;
 4090|       |    var start = parent_angle - spread * upper;
 4091|       |    var end = parent_angle + spread * lower;
 4092|       |    assign_even(kids, start, end);
 4093|       |    for (var i = 0; i < kids.length; i++) {
 4094|       |      assign_child_angles(kids[i], depth + 1);
 4095|       |    }
 4096|       |  }
 4097|       |  for (var a = 0; a < root_kids.length; a++) {
 4098|       |    assign_child_angles(root_kids[a], 1);
 4099|       |  }
 4100|       |  function place_node(node_id, depth) {
 4101|       |    var kids = __mdmdview_mindmap_sorted_children(node_id, tree);
 4102|       |    if (!kids.length) { return; }
 4103|       |    var parent_pos = positions[node_id];
 4104|       |    var parent_size = sizes[node_id];
 4105|       |    var parent_radius = Math.max(parent_size.w, parent_size.h) / 2;
 4106|       |    var parent_angle = angles[node_id] || 0;
 4107|       |    for (var i = 0; i < kids.length; i++) {
 4108|       |      var child = kids[i];
 4109|       |      var angle = angles[child];
 4110|       |      if (angle === undefined) { angle = angles[node_id] || 0; }
 4111|       |      var child_size = sizes[child];
 4112|       |      var child_radius = Math.max(child_size.w, child_size.h) / 2;
 4113|       |      var dist = parent_radius + child_radius + gap_x;
 4114|       |      if (depth > 0) {
 4115|       |        dist *= 1.15;
 4116|       |      }
 4117|       |      var factor = 1;
 4118|       |      if (depth === 0) {
 4119|       |        var cos = Math.cos(angle);
 4120|       |        var sin = Math.sin(angle);
 4121|       |        factor *= 1.1 * (1 + 0.2 * cos + 0.1 * sin);
 4122|       |      } else {
 4123|       |        var diff = angle - parent_angle;
 4124|       |        while (diff > Math.PI) { diff -= Math.PI * 2; }
 4125|       |        while (diff < -Math.PI) { diff += Math.PI * 2; }
 4126|       |        var norm = diff / (Math.PI / 6);
 4127|       |        if (norm > 1) { norm = 1; }
 4128|       |        if (norm < -1) { norm = -1; }
 4129|       |        factor *= 1 + 0.12 * norm;
 4130|       |        factor *= 0.98 + depth * 0.04;
 4131|       |      }
 4132|       |      if (depth > 0) {
 4133|       |        var sin = Math.sin(angle);
 4134|       |        var cos = Math.cos(angle);
 4135|       |        if (sin >= 0) {
 4136|       |          factor *= 1 + 0.15 * sin;
 4137|       |        } else if (cos > 0) {
 4138|       |          factor *= 1 + 0.05 * sin;
 4139|       |        } else {
 4140|       |          factor *= 1 + 0.25 * sin;
 4141|       |        }
 4142|       |        if (sin < -0.2 && cos < 0) {
 4143|       |          factor *= 0.9;
 4144|       |        }
 4145|       |      }
 4146|       |      if (kids.length === 1) {
 4147|       |        factor *= 0.95;
 4148|       |      }
 4149|       |      dist = dist * factor;
 4150|       |      var cx = parent_pos.x + Math.cos(angle) * dist;
 4151|       |      var cy = parent_pos.y + Math.sin(angle) * dist;
 4152|       |      positions[child] = { x: cx, y: cy };
 4153|       |      place_node(child, depth + 1);
 4154|       |    }
 4155|       |  }
 4156|       |  place_node(tree.root_id, 0);
 4157|       |  var min_x = Infinity;
 4158|       |  var min_y = Infinity;
 4159|       |  for (var id in positions) {
 4160|       |    if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(positions, id)) { continue; }
 4161|       |    var pos = positions[id];
 4162|       |    var size = sizes[id];
 4163|       |    var lx = pos.x - size.w / 2;
 4164|       |    var ly = pos.y - size.h / 2;
 4165|       |    if (lx < min_x) { min_x = lx; }
 4166|       |    if (ly < min_y) { min_y = ly; }
 4167|       |  }
 4168|       |  if (!isFinite(min_x)) { min_x = 0; }
 4169|       |  if (!isFinite(min_y)) { min_y = 0; }
 4170|       |  var dx = pad - min_x;
 4171|       |  var dy = pad - min_y;
 4172|       |  for (var nid in positions) {
 4173|       |    if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(positions, nid)) { continue; }
 4174|       |    positions[nid].x += dx;
 4175|       |    positions[nid].y += dy;
 4176|       |  }
 4177|       |  for (var n = 0; n < nodes.length; n++) {
 4178|       |    var node = nodes[n];
 4179|       |    if (!node || typeof node.data !== 'function') { continue; }
 4180|       |    var data = node.data();
 4181|       |    var id = data && data.id !== undefined ? String(data.id) : null;
 4182|       |    if (!id || !positions[id]) { continue; }
 4183|       |    node._position = { x: positions[id].x, y: positions[id].y };
 4184|       |    node.position = function() { return this._position; };
 4185|       |    data.x = positions[id].x;
 4186|       |    data.y = positions[id].y;
 4187|       |  }
 4188|       |  for (var e = 0; e < edges.length; e++) {
 4189|       |    var edge = edges[e];
 4190|       |    if (!edge || typeof edge.data !== 'function') { continue; }
 4191|       |    var ed = edge.data();
 4192|       |    var source = ed && ed.source !== undefined ? String(ed.source) : null;
 4193|       |    var target = ed && ed.target !== undefined ? String(ed.target) : null;
 4194|       |    if (!source || !target) { continue; }
 4195|       |    var s_pos = positions[source];
 4196|       |    var t_pos = positions[target];
 4197|       |    if (!s_pos || !t_pos) { continue; }
 4198|       |    var s_size = sizes[source];
 4199|       |    var t_size = sizes[target];
 4200|       |    var dx = t_pos.x - s_pos.x;
 4201|       |    var dy = t_pos.y - s_pos.y;
 4202|       |    var len = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
 4203|       |    if (!isFinite(len) || len <= 0.001) { len = 1; }
 4204|       |    var ux = dx / len;
 4205|       |    var uy = dy / len;
 4206|       |    var s_radius = __mdmdview_rect_intersection(s_size.w / 2, s_size.h / 2, ux, uy);
 4207|       |    var t_radius = __mdmdview_rect_intersection(t_size.w / 2, t_size.h / 2, ux, uy);
 4208|       |    var overlap = -2;
 4209|       |    s_radius += overlap;
 4210|       |    t_radius += overlap;
 4211|       |    if (s_radius < 0) { s_radius = 0; }
 4212|       |    if (t_radius < 0) { t_radius = 0; }
 4213|       |    var max_total = len * 0.95;
 4214|       |    if (s_radius + t_radius > max_total) {
 4215|       |      var scale = max_total / (s_radius + t_radius);
 4216|       |      s_radius *= scale;
 4217|       |      t_radius *= scale;
 4218|       |    }
 4219|       |    var sx = s_pos.x + ux * s_radius;
 4220|       |    var sy = s_pos.y + uy * s_radius;
 4221|       |    var ex = t_pos.x - ux * t_radius;
 4222|       |    var ey = t_pos.y - uy * t_radius;
 4223|       |    var mx = (sx + ex) / 2;
 4224|       |    var my = (sy + ey) / 2;
 4225|       |    edge[0] = edge[0] || {};
 4226|       |    edge[0]._private = {
 4227|       |      bodyBounds: true,
 4228|       |      rscratch: {
 4229|       |        startX: sx,
 4230|       |        startY: sy,
 4231|       |        midX: mx,
 4232|       |        midY: my,
 4233|       |        endX: ex,
 4234|       |        endY: ey
 4235|       |      }
 4236|       |    };
 4237|       |  }
 4238|       |}

 4625|       |function __mdmdview_matches_simple(node, raw) {
 4626|       |  if (!node || !raw) { return false; }
 4627|       |  var attr = __mdmdview_parse_attr_selector(raw);

 4635|       |  }

 4638|       |  }

 4654|       |function __mdmdview_matches_selector(node, sel) {
 4655|       |  if (!node || !sel) { return false; }

 4664|       |      idx -= 1;

 4666|       |    current = current.parentNode;
 4667|       |  }

 4670|       |function __mdmdview_query_selector(node, sel) {
 4671|       |  if (!sel) { return null; }

 4675|       |  if ((!node || !node.children) && document && document.body) { node = document.body; }
 4676|       |  var chain = raw.split(/\s+/).filter(function(part) { return part.length > 0; });

 4678|       |    var current = node;
 4679|       |    for (var c = 0; c < chain.length; c++) {
 4680|       |      current = __mdmdview_query_selector(current, chain[c]);
 4681|       |      if (!current) { return null; }
 4682|       |    }
 4683|       |    return current;
 4684|       |  }

 4692|       |    var className = raw.slice(1);
 4693|       |    var classMatches = [];

 4706|       |      }
 4707|       |    }
 4708|       |  } else if (raw.indexOf('.') > 0) {

 4728|       |function __mdmdview_query_selector_all(node, sel) {

 4731|       |  if (!raw) { return []; }
 4732|       |  if (node && !node.tagName && node._parent) { node = node._parent; }
 4733|       |  if ((!node || !node.children) && document && document.body) { node = document.body; }
 4734|       |  var chain = raw.split(/\s+/).filter(function(part) { return part.length > 0; });
 4735|       |  if (chain.length > 1) {
 4736|       |    var current = node;
 4737|       |    for (var c = 0; c < chain.length; c++) {
 4738|       |      current = __mdmdview_query_selector(current, chain[c]);

 4752|       |  }
 4753|       |  if (raw[0] === '.') {

 5213|       |  };
 5214|       |  window.__mdmdview_merge_config = function(baseConfig, overrideConfig) {
 5215|       |    var out = {};

 5217|       |      if (!window.__mdmdview_is_plain_object(source)) { return; }

 5221|       |        if (window.__mdmdview_is_plain_object(value)) {

 5233|       |    return out;
 5234|       |  };
 5235|       |  window.__mdmdview_sanitize_config = function(cfg) {
 5236|       |    if (!window.__mdmdview_is_plain_object(cfg)) { return null; }
 5237|       |    var disallowed = {
 5238|       |      securityLevel: true,
 5239|       |      startOnLoad: true,
 5240|       |      maxTextSize: true,
 5241|       |      deterministicIds: true,
 5242|       |      deterministicIDSeed: true,
 5243|       |      htmlLabels: true,
 5244|       |      themeCSS: true,
 5245|       |      dompurifyConfig: true,
 5246|       |      secure: true
 5247|       |    };
 5248|       |    var out = {};
 5249|       |    for (var key in cfg) {
 5250|       |      if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(cfg, key)) { continue; }
 5251|       |      if (key.indexOf('__') === 0 || key.indexOf('proto') >= 0 || key.indexOf('constructor') >= 0) {
 5252|       |        continue;
 5253|       |      }
 5254|       |      if (disallowed[key]) { continue; }
 5255|       |      var value = cfg[key];
 5256|       |      if (window.__mdmdview_is_plain_object(value)) {
 5257|       |        var nested = window.__mdmdview_sanitize_config(value);
 5258|       |        if (nested && Object.keys(nested).length) { out[key] = nested; }
 5259|       |      } else if (Array.isArray(value)) {
 5260|       |        out[key] = value.slice();
 5261|       |      } else {
 5262|       |        out[key] = value;
 5263|       |      }
 5264|       |    }
 5265|       |    if (out.themeVariables && window.__mdmdview_is_plain_object(out.themeVariables)) {
 5266|       |      for (var tvKey in out.themeVariables) {
 5267|       |        if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(out.themeVariables, tvKey)) { continue; }
 5268|       |        var tvVal = out.themeVariables[tvKey];
 5269|       |        if (typeof tvVal === 'string') {
 5270|       |          if (!tvVal.match(/^[\d "#%(),.;A-Za-z-]+$/)) {
 5271|       |            delete out.themeVariables[tvKey];
 5272|       |          }
 5273|       |        }
 5274|       |      }
 5275|       |    }
 5276|       |    return out;
 5277|       |  };
 5278|       |  window.__mdmdview_extract_init = function(code) {
 5279|       |    if (typeof code !== 'string') { return { code: code, config: null }; }
 5280|       |    var initRe = /%%\{\s*init\s*:\s*([\s\S]*?)\s*\}%%/g;
 5281|       |    var found = null;
 5282|       |    var cleaned = code.replace(initRe, function(match, json) {
 5283|       |      if (found === null) {
 5284|       |        try { found = JSON.parse(json); } catch (e) { found = null; }
 5285|       |      }
 5286|       |      return '';
 5287|       |    });
 5288|       |    return { code: cleaned, config: found };
 5289|       |  };
 5290|       |} else {
 5291|       |  throw new Error('Mermaid not available');
 5292|       |}
 5293|       |"##;
 5294|       |
 5295|       |#[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5296|       |const MERMAID_RENDER_WRAPPER: &str = r#"
 5297|       |(function(id, code, siteConfigJson, viewportWidth, viewportHeight){
 5298|       |  if (typeof __mdmdview_reset_dom === 'function') {
 5299|       |    __mdmdview_reset_dom();
 5300|       |  }
 5301|       |  if (typeof viewportWidth === 'number' && viewportWidth > 0) {
 5302|       |    window.__mdmdview_viewport_width = viewportWidth;
 5303|       |  }
 5304|       |  if (typeof viewportHeight === 'number' && viewportHeight > 0) {
 5305|       |    window.__mdmdview_viewport_height = viewportHeight;
 5306|       |  }
 5307|       |  var siteConfig = {};
 5308|       |  if (typeof siteConfigJson === 'string' && siteConfigJson.length > 0) {
 5309|       |    try { siteConfig = JSON.parse(siteConfigJson); } catch (e) { siteConfig = {}; }
 5310|       |  }
 5311|       |  var extracted = window.__mdmdview_extract_init(code);
 5312|       |  var directiveConfig = window.__mdmdview_sanitize_config(extracted.config) || {};
 5313|       |  var merged = window.__mdmdview_merge_config(directiveConfig, siteConfig);
 5314|       |  var allowHtmlLabels = merged && merged.__mdmdviewAllowHtmlLabels === true;
 5315|       |  if (allowHtmlLabels) {
 5316|       |    merged.htmlLabels = true;
 5317|       |    if (!merged.flowchart) { merged.flowchart = {}; }
 5318|       |    merged.flowchart.htmlLabels = true;
 5319|       |    delete merged.__mdmdviewAllowHtmlLabels;
 5320|       |  }
 5321|       |  if (merged && merged.securityLevel === 'strict' && !allowHtmlLabels) {
 5322|       |    merged.htmlLabels = false;
 5323|       |    if (!merged.flowchart) { merged.flowchart = {}; }
 5324|       |    merged.flowchart.htmlLabels = false;
 5325|       |  }
 5326|       |  function __mdmdview_flush_timers() {
 5327|       |    if (typeof __mdmdview_run_timers !== 'function') { return; }
 5328|       |    var remaining = 0;
 5329|       |    var cycles = 0;
 5330|       |    do {
 5331|       |      remaining = __mdmdview_run_timers(1000);
 5332|       |      cycles++;
 5333|       |    } while (remaining > 0 && cycles < 100);
 5334|       |    if (remaining > 0) { throw new Error('Mermaid timer queue did not drain'); }
 5335|       |  }
 5336|       |  function __mdmdview_pump_timers(max_cycles) {
 5337|       |    var cycles = 0;
 5338|       |    function step() {
 5339|       |      if (typeof __mdmdview_run_timers !== 'function') {
 5340|       |        return Promise.resolve();
 5341|       |      }
 5342|       |      var remaining = __mdmdview_run_timers(1000);
 5343|       |      cycles++;
 5344|       |      if (remaining > 0 && cycles < max_cycles) {
 5345|       |        return Promise.resolve().then(step);
 5346|       |      }
 5347|       |      if (remaining > 0) {
 5348|       |        return Promise.reject(new Error('Mermaid timer queue did not drain'));
 5349|       |      }
 5350|       |      return Promise.resolve();
 5351|       |    }
 5352|       |    return step();
 5353|       |  }
 5354|       |  mermaid.mermaidAPI.initialize(merged);
 5355|       |  var renderCode = extracted && extracted.code !== undefined ? extracted.code : code;
 5356|       |  var svgOut = null;
 5357|       |  var renderResult = null;
 5358|       |  try {
 5359|       |    renderResult = mermaid.mermaidAPI.render(id, renderCode, function(svg){ svgOut = svg; });
 5360|       |    __mdmdview_flush_timers();
 5361|       |  } catch (err) {
 5362|       |    throw err;
 5363|       |  }
 5364|       |  if (renderResult && typeof renderResult.then === 'function') {
 5365|       |    var pump = __mdmdview_pump_timers(400);
 5366|       |    return Promise.all([renderResult, pump]).then(function(values){
 5367|       |      __mdmdview_flush_timers();
 5368|       |      var out = values && values.length ? values[0] : null;
 5369|       |      if (typeof out === 'string') { return out; }
 5370|       |      if (out && out.svg) { return out.svg; }
 5371|       |      if (typeof svgOut === 'string' && svgOut.length > 0) { return svgOut; }
 5372|       |      throw new Error('Mermaid render returned empty');
 5373|       |    });
 5374|       |  }
 5375|       |  if (typeof renderResult === 'string') { return renderResult; }
 5376|       |  if (renderResult && renderResult.svg) { return renderResult.svg; }
 5377|       |  if (typeof svgOut === 'string' && svgOut.length > 0) { return svgOut; }
 5378|       |  throw new Error('Mermaid render returned empty');
 5379|       |})
 5380|       |"#;

 5390|       |        static ENV_LOCK: OnceLock<Mutex<()>> = OnceLock::new();
 5391|       |        ENV_LOCK
 5392|       |            .get_or_init(|| Mutex::new(()))
 5393|       |            .lock()
 5394|       |            .unwrap_or_else(|poisoned| poisoned.into_inner())
 5395|       |    }

 5572|       |    fn test_lru_cache_insert_and_evict_type_variants() {
 5573|       |        let mut id_cache = LruCache::new(1);
 5574|       |        id_cache.insert(1u64, "one".to_string());
 5575|       |        id_cache.insert(2u64, "two".to_string());
 5576|       |        id_cache.entries.insert(3u64, "three".to_string());

 5581|       |        assert!(!id_cache.evict_oldest());

 5593|       |        assert!(!string_cache.evict_oldest());

 5637|       |        let mut string_cache = LruCache::new(2);
 5638|       |        string_cache.insert(1u64, "one".to_string());
 5639|       |        string_cache.insert(2u64, "two".to_string());
 5640|       |        assert_eq!(string_cache.get(&1), Some("one".to_string()));
 5641|       |        assert!(string_cache.get(&3).is_none());
 5642|       |        string_cache.insert(1u64, "uno".to_string());
 5643|       |        string_cache.insert(3u64, "three".to_string());
 5644|       |
 5645|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5646|       |        let tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5647|       |            "mermaid_cache_test",
 5648|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([1, 1], Color32::WHITE),
 5649|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5650|       |        );

 5661|       |        texture_cache.entries.insert("c".to_string(), entry.clone());

 5666|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5667|       |    #[test]
 5668|       |    fn test_svg_cache_size_based_eviction() {
 5669|       |        // Test that SvgCache evicts based on size, not just count
 5670|       |        let mut cache = SvgCache::new(10, 100); // 10 entries max, 100 bytes max
 5671|       |
 5672|       |        // Insert small entries that fit within size limit
 5673|       |        cache.insert(1, "abc".to_string()); // 3 bytes
 5674|       |        cache.insert(2, "def".to_string()); // 3 bytes
 5675|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5676|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 6);
 5677|       |
 5678|       |        // Insert large entry that exceeds size limit - should evict oldest
 5679|       |        let large_svg = "x".repeat(95); // 95 bytes
 5680|       |        cache.insert(3, large_svg);
 5681|       |        // current=6, adding 95 -> 101 > 100, so evict entry 1 (oldest)
 5682|       |        // After evicting entry 1: current=3, 3+95=98 <= 100, so stop evicting
 5683|       |        assert!(cache.get(&1).is_none()); // Entry 1 was evicted
 5684|       |        assert!(cache.get(&2).is_some()); // Entry 2 still present (3+95=98 <= 100)
 5685|       |        assert!(cache.get(&3).is_some());
 5686|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 98); // 3 (entry 2) + 95 (entry 3)
 5687|       |
 5688|       |        // Now insert another large entry to force more eviction
 5689|       |        let another_large = "y".repeat(50); // 50 bytes
 5690|       |        cache.insert(4, another_large);
 5691|       |        // current=98, adding 50 -> 148 > 100, evict entry 2 (now oldest)
 5692|       |        // After evicting 2: current=95, 95+50=145 > 100, evict entry 3
 5693|       |        // After evicting 3: current=0, 0+50=50 <= 100, insert
 5694|       |        assert!(cache.get(&2).is_none());
 5695|       |        assert!(cache.get(&3).is_none());
 5696|       |        assert!(cache.get(&4).is_some());
 5697|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 50);
 5698|       |    }
 5699|       |
 5700|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5701|       |    #[test]
 5702|       |    fn test_svg_cache_count_based_eviction() {
 5703|       |        // Test that SvgCache still respects entry count limit
 5704|       |        let mut cache = SvgCache::new(2, 1000); // 2 entries max, 1000 bytes max
 5705|       |
 5706|       |        cache.insert(1, "a".to_string());
 5707|       |        cache.insert(2, "b".to_string());
 5708|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5709|       |
 5710|       |        // Insert third entry - should evict oldest (entry 1)
 5711|       |        cache.insert(3, "c".to_string());
 5712|       |        assert!(cache.get(&1).is_none());
 5713|       |        assert!(cache.get(&2).is_some());
 5714|       |        assert!(cache.get(&3).is_some());
 5715|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5716|       |    }

 5718|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5719|       |    #[test]
 5720|       |    fn test_svg_cache_update_existing_key() {
 5721|       |        let mut cache = SvgCache::new(10, 1000);
 5722|       |
 5723|       |        cache.insert(1, "short".to_string()); // 5 bytes
 5724|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 5);
 5725|       |
 5726|       |        // Update with longer value
 5727|       |        cache.insert(1, "much longer string".to_string()); // 18 bytes
 5728|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 1);
 5729|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 18);
 5730|       |
 5731|       |        // Update with shorter value
 5732|       |        cache.insert(1, "x".to_string()); // 1 byte
 5733|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 1);
 5734|       |    }

 5736|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5737|       |    #[test]
 5738|       |    fn test_svg_cache_touch_on_get() {
 5739|       |        let mut cache = SvgCache::new(2, 1000);
 5740|       |
 5741|       |        cache.insert(1, "a".to_string());
 5742|       |        cache.insert(2, "b".to_string());
 5743|       |
 5744|       |        // Access entry 1 to move it to back of LRU order
 5745|       |        let _ = cache.get(&1);
 5746|       |
 5747|       |        // Insert third entry - should evict entry 2 (now oldest)
 5748|       |        cache.insert(3, "c".to_string());
 5749|       |        assert!(cache.get(&1).is_some()); // Entry 1 survived because it was accessed
 5750|       |        assert!(cache.get(&2).is_none()); // Entry 2 was evicted
 5751|       |        assert!(cache.get(&3).is_some());
 5752|       |    }

 5754|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5755|       |    #[test]
 5756|       |    fn test_texture_cache_size_based_eviction() {
 5757|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5758|       |        // Create a small texture that's 10x10 = 100 pixels = 400 bytes
 5759|       |        let small_tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5760|       |            "small",
 5761|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([10, 10], Color32::WHITE),
 5762|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5763|       |        );
 5764|       |        // Create textures and set max_bytes to 1000 (enough for 2 textures but not 3)
 5765|       |        let mut cache = TextureCache::new(10, 1000);
 5766|       |
 5767|       |        let entry1 = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5768|       |            texture: small_tex.clone(),
 5769|       |            size: [10, 10], // 400 bytes
 5770|       |        };
 5771|       |        let entry2 = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5772|       |            texture: small_tex.clone(),
 5773|       |            size: [10, 10], // 400 bytes
 5774|       |        };
 5775|       |        let entry3 = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5776|       |            texture: small_tex.clone(),
 5777|       |            size: [10, 10], // 400 bytes
 5778|       |        };
 5779|       |
 5780|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), entry1);
 5781|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 1);
 5782|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 400);
 5783|       |
 5784|       |        cache.insert("b".to_string(), entry2);
 5785|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5786|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 800);
 5787|       |
 5788|       |        // This should evict "a" because total would exceed 1000 bytes
 5789|       |        cache.insert("c".to_string(), entry3);
 5790|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5791|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 800);
 5792|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"a".to_string()).is_none()); // Evicted
 5793|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"b".to_string()).is_some());
 5794|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"c".to_string()).is_some());
 5795|       |    }
 5796|       |
 5797|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5798|       |    #[test]
 5799|       |    fn test_texture_cache_count_based_eviction() {
 5800|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5801|       |        let small_tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5802|       |            "count_test",
 5803|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([1, 1], Color32::WHITE),
 5804|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5805|       |        );
 5806|       |        // Capacity 2, large byte limit (count-based eviction should trigger first)
 5807|       |        let mut cache = TextureCache::new(2, 1024 * 1024);
 5808|       |
 5809|       |        let entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5810|       |            texture: small_tex.clone(),
 5811|       |            size: [1, 1], // 4 bytes
 5812|       |        };
 5813|       |
 5814|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5815|       |        cache.insert("b".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5816|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5817|       |
 5818|       |        // This should evict "a" because capacity is 2
 5819|       |        cache.insert("c".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5820|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5821|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"a".to_string()).is_none());
 5822|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"b".to_string()).is_some());
 5823|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"c".to_string()).is_some());
 5824|       |    }

 5826|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5827|       |    #[test]
 5828|       |    fn test_texture_cache_update_existing_key() {
 5829|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5830|       |        let small_tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5831|       |            "update_test",
 5832|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([5, 5], Color32::WHITE),
 5833|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5834|       |        );
 5835|       |        let large_tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5836|       |            "update_test_large",
 5837|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([10, 10], Color32::WHITE),
 5838|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5839|       |        );
 5840|       |        let mut cache = TextureCache::new(10, 1024 * 1024);
 5841|       |
 5842|       |        let small_entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5843|       |            texture: small_tex,
 5844|       |            size: [5, 5], // 100 bytes
 5845|       |        };
 5846|       |        let large_entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5847|       |            texture: large_tex,
 5848|       |            size: [10, 10], // 400 bytes
 5849|       |        };
 5850|       |
 5851|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), small_entry);
 5852|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 100);
 5853|       |
 5854|       |        // Update same key with larger entry
 5855|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), large_entry);
 5856|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 1);
 5857|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 400);
 5858|       |    }
 5859|       |
 5860|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5861|       |    #[test]
 5862|       |    fn test_texture_cache_touch_on_get() {
 5863|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5864|       |        let small_tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5865|       |            "touch_test",
 5866|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([1, 1], Color32::WHITE),
 5867|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5868|       |        );
 5869|       |        let mut cache = TextureCache::new(2, 1024 * 1024);
 5870|       |
 5871|       |        let entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5872|       |            texture: small_tex.clone(),
 5873|       |            size: [1, 1],
 5874|       |        };
 5875|       |
 5876|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5877|       |        cache.insert("b".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5878|       |
 5879|       |        // Touch "a" by getting it
 5880|       |        let _ = cache.get(&"a".to_string());
 5881|       |
 5882|       |        // Now "c" should evict "b" (not "a") because "a" was touched more recently
 5883|       |        cache.insert("c".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5884|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"a".to_string()).is_some());
 5885|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"b".to_string()).is_none()); // Evicted
 5886|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"c".to_string()).is_some());
 5887|       |    }
 5888|       |
 5889|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5890|       |    #[test]
 5891|       |    fn test_texture_cache_clear() {
 5892|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5893|       |        let tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5894|       |            "clear_test",
 5895|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([10, 10], Color32::WHITE),
 5896|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5897|       |        );
 5898|       |        let mut cache = TextureCache::new(10, 1024 * 1024);
 5899|       |
 5900|       |        let entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5901|       |            texture: tex.clone(),
 5902|       |            size: [10, 10], // 400 bytes
 5903|       |        };
 5904|       |
 5905|       |        // Insert multiple entries
 5906|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5907|       |        cache.insert("b".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5908|       |        cache.insert("c".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5909|       |
 5910|       |        // Verify cache has entries
 5911|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 3);
 5912|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 1200); // 3 * 400 bytes
 5913|       |
 5914|       |        // Clear the cache
 5915|       |        cache.clear();
 5916|       |
 5917|       |        // Verify cache is now empty
 5918|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 0);
 5919|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 0);
 5920|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"a".to_string()).is_none());
 5921|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"b".to_string()).is_none());
 5922|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"c".to_string()).is_none());
 5923|       |    }

 5925|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5926|       |    #[test]
 5927|       |    fn test_mermaid_renderer_cache_branches() {
 5928|       |        let renderer = MermaidRenderer::new();
 5929|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5930|       |        let tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5931|       |            "mermaid_renderer_cache",
 5932|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([1, 1], Color32::WHITE),
 5933|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5934|       |        );
 5935|       |        let entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5936|       |            texture: tex,
 5937|       |            size: [1, 1],
 5938|       |        };
 5939|       |
 5940|       |        {
 5941|       |            let mut cache = renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow_mut();
 5942|       |            assert!(cache.get(&"miss".to_string()).is_none());
 5943|       |            cache.insert("hit".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5944|       |            assert!(cache.get(&"hit".to_string()).is_some());
 5945|       |            cache.entries.insert("stale".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5946|       |            cache.order.clear();
 5947|       |            cache.insert("fresh".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5948|       |        }
 5949|       |
 5950|       |        {
 5951|       |            let mut cache = renderer.mermaid_svg_cache.borrow_mut();
 5952|       |            assert!(cache.get(&1).is_none());
 5953|       |            cache.insert(1, "one".to_string());
 5954|       |            assert!(cache.get(&1).is_some());
 5955|       |            cache.entries.insert(2, "two".to_string());
 5956|       |            cache.order.clear();
 5957|       |            cache.insert(3, "three".to_string());
 5958|       |        }
 5959|       |
 5960|       |        {
 5961|       |            let mut cache = renderer.mermaid_errors.borrow_mut();
 5962|       |            assert!(cache.get(&1).is_none());
 5963|       |            cache.insert(1, "err".to_string());
 5964|       |            assert!(cache.get(&1).is_some());
 5965|       |            cache.entries.insert(2, "err2".to_string());
 5966|       |            cache.order.clear();
 5967|       |            cache.insert(3, "err3".to_string());
 5968|       |        }
 5969|       |
 5970|       |        {
 5971|       |            let mut cache = renderer.mermaid_texture_errors.borrow_mut();
 5972|       |            assert!(cache.get(&"miss".to_string()).is_none());
 5973|       |            cache.insert("hit".to_string(), "err".to_string());
 5974|       |            assert!(cache.get(&"hit".to_string()).is_some());
 5975|       |            cache
 5976|       |                .entries
 5977|       |                .insert("stale".to_string(), "err2".to_string());
 5978|       |            cache.order.clear();
 5979|       |            cache.insert("fresh".to_string(), "err3".to_string());
 5980|       |        }
 5981|       |    }

 5983|       |    #[test]
 5984|       |    fn test_mermaid_texture_key_changes_with_scale_and_bg() {
 5985|       |        let svg_key = 42;
 5986|       |        let width_bucket = 320;
 5987|       |        let scale_a = MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0);
 5988|       |        let scale_b = MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.2);
 5989|       |        let bg_a = [255, 0, 0, 255];
 5990|       |        let bg_b = [0, 0, 0, 255];
 5991|       |
 5992|       |        let key_a = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, width_bucket, scale_a, bg_a);
 5993|       |        let key_b = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, width_bucket, scale_b, bg_a);
 5994|       |        let key_c = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, width_bucket, scale_a, bg_b);
 5995|       |
 5996|       |        assert_ne!(key_a, key_b);
 5997|       |        assert_ne!(key_a, key_c);
 5998|       |    }

 6001|       |    fn test_mermaid_width_bucket_rounds_up() {
 6002|       |        let step = MermaidRenderer::MERMAID_WIDTH_BUCKET_STEP;
 6003|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(1.0), step);
 6004|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(step as f32 + 0.1), step * 2);
 6005|       |    }

 6023|       |    fn test_should_allow_html_labels_always_false_for_usvg() {
 6024|       |        // HTML labels are disabled because usvg cannot render foreignObject.
 6025|       |        // All inputs should return false to force SVG text elements.
 6026|       |        assert!(!MermaidRenderer::should_allow_html_labels(
 6027|       |            "graph TD; A[\"<i>Voice</i>\"]"
 6028|       |        ));
 6029|       |        assert!(!MermaidRenderer::should_allow_html_labels(
 6030|       |            "graph TD; A[\"<b>Bold</b>\"]"
 6031|       |        ));
 6032|       |        assert!(!MermaidRenderer::should_allow_html_labels(
 6033|       |            "graph TD; A[\"<script>bad</script>\"]"
 6034|       |        ));
 6035|       |        assert!(!MermaidRenderer::should_allow_html_labels(
 6036|       |            "graph TD; A[\"plain text\"]"
 6037|       |        ));
 6038|       |    }

 6111|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6112|       |    #[test]
 6113|       |    fn test_mermaid_quickjs_render_smoke() {
 6114|       |        let mut worker = test_worker();
 6115|       |
 6116|       |        let flow = "graph TD; A-->B;";
 6117|       |        let seq = "sequenceDiagram\nAlice->>Bob: Hello\nBob-->>Alice: Hi";
 6118|       |        let class = "classDiagram\nClass01 <|-- Class02\nClass01 : +int id\nClass02 : +String name";
 6119|       |        let er = "erDiagram\nCUSTOMER ||--o{ ORDER : places\nORDER ||--|{ LINE_ITEM : contains\nCUSTOMER {\n  int id\n  string name\n}\nORDER {\n  int id\n  date created\n}\nLINE_ITEM {\n  int id\n  int qty\n}\n";
 6120|       |        let gantt = "gantt\ntitle Sample Gantt\ndateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD\nsection A\nTask 1 :a1, 2024-01-01, 5d\nTask 2 :after a1, 3d\nsection B\nTask 3 :b1, 2024-01-06, 4d\n";
 6121|       |        let viewport_width = 1200;
 6122|       |        let viewport_height = 900;
 6123|       |
 6124|       |        let flow_svg = worker
 6125|       |            .render_svg(
 6126|       |                hash_str(flow),
 6127|       |                flow,
 6128|       |                viewport_width,
 6129|       |                viewport_height,
 6130|       |                MermaidTheme::Default,
 6131|       |            )
 6132|       |            .expect("flowchart render");
 6133|       |        let seq_svg = worker
 6134|       |            .render_svg(
 6135|       |                hash_str(seq),
 6136|       |                seq,
 6137|       |                viewport_width,
 6138|       |                viewport_height,
 6139|       |                MermaidTheme::Default,
 6140|       |            )
 6141|       |            .expect("sequence render");
 6142|       |        let class_svg = worker
 6143|       |            .render_svg(
 6144|       |                hash_str(class),
 6145|       |                class,
 6146|       |                viewport_width,
 6147|       |                viewport_height,
 6148|       |                MermaidTheme::Default,
 6149|       |            )
 6150|       |            .expect("class render");
 6151|       |        let er_svg = worker
 6152|       |            .render_svg(
 6153|       |                hash_str(er),
 6154|       |                er,
 6155|       |                viewport_width,
 6156|       |                viewport_height,
 6157|       |                MermaidTheme::Default,
 6158|       |            )
 6159|       |            .expect("er render");
 6160|       |        let gantt_svg = worker
 6161|       |            .render_svg(
 6162|       |                hash_str(gantt),
 6163|       |                gantt,
 6164|       |                viewport_width,
 6165|       |                viewport_height,
 6166|       |                MermaidTheme::Default,
 6167|       |            )
 6168|       |            .expect("gantt render");
 6169|       |
 6170|       |        assert!(flow_svg.contains("<svg"));
 6171|       |        assert!(seq_svg.contains("<svg"));
 6172|       |        assert!(class_svg.contains("<svg"));
 6173|       |        assert!(er_svg.contains("<svg"));
 6174|       |        assert!(gantt_svg.contains("<svg"));
 6175|       |
 6176|       |        let width_bucket = MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(600.0);
 6177|       |        let scale_bucket = MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0);
 6178|       |        let (rgba, w, h) = worker
 6179|       |            .rasterize_svg(
 6180|       |                &flow_svg,
 6181|       |                width_bucket,
 6182|       |                scale_bucket,
 6183|       |                MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(),
 6184|       |            )
 6185|       |            .expect("rasterize svg");
 6186|       |        assert!(!rgba.is_empty());
 6187|       |        assert_eq!(rgba.len(), (w as usize) * (h as usize) * 4);
 6188|       |        assert!(w > 0);
 6189|       |        assert!(h > 0);
 6190|       |        assert!(w <= MermaidRenderer::MERMAID_MAX_RENDER_SIDE);
 6191|       |        assert!(h <= MermaidRenderer::MERMAID_MAX_RENDER_SIDE);
 6192|       |    }

 6197|       |        let mut worker = test_worker();
 6198|       |
 6199|       |        // HTML tags in labels - rendered as SVG text (not foreignObject) since htmlLabels=false
 6200|       |        let diagram = r#"graph TD; A[hello<br/><i>world</i>]-->B"#;
 6201|       |
 6202|       |        let viewport_width = 1200;
 6203|       |        let viewport_height = 900;
 6204|       |
 6205|       |        let svg = worker
 6206|       |            .render_svg(
 6207|       |                hash_str(diagram),
 6208|       |                diagram,
 6209|       |                viewport_width,
 6210|       |                viewport_height,
 6211|       |                MermaidTheme::Default,
 6212|       |            )
 6213|       |            .expect("diagram with html tags render");
 6214|       |
 6215|       |        assert!(svg.contains("<svg"));
 6216|       |        // Text should be in SVG text elements (htmlLabels disabled for usvg compatibility)
 6217|       |        assert!(svg.contains("hello"), "Label text 'hello' should be in SVG");
 6218|       |    }

 6279|       |            )

 6290|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6291|       |    #[test]
 6292|       |    fn test_mermaid_js_empty_override_matches_thread() {
 6293|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 6294|       |        assert_eq!(mermaid_js_empty(), MERMAID_JS_EMPTY);
 6295|       |        {
 6296|       |            let _guard = MermaidJsEmptyGuard::set(true);
 6297|       |            assert!(mermaid_js_empty());
 6298|       |        }
 6299|       |        assert_eq!(mermaid_js_empty(), MERMAID_JS_EMPTY);
 6300|       |    }
 6301|       |
 6302|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6303|       |    #[test]
 6304|       |    fn test_mermaid_js_empty_override_mismatch_thread() {
 6305|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 6306|       |        let handle = std::thread::spawn(|| set_mermaid_js_empty_for_test(true));
 6307|       |        let _ = handle.join();
 6308|       |        assert_eq!(mermaid_js_empty(), MERMAID_JS_EMPTY);
 6309|       |        set_mermaid_js_empty_for_test(false);
 6310|       |    }
 6311|       |
 6312|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6313|       |    #[test]
 6314|       |    fn test_mermaid_js_empty_override_false_clears() {
 6315|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 6316|       |        set_mermaid_js_empty_for_test(true);
 6317|       |        let previous = set_mermaid_js_empty_for_test(false);
 6318|       |        assert!(previous.is_some());
 6319|       |        assert_eq!(mermaid_js_empty(), MERMAID_JS_EMPTY);
 6320|       |    }

 6327|       |        assert_eq!(mermaid_js_empty(), MERMAID_JS_EMPTY);

 6344|       |    fn test_measure_text_native_handles_optional_weight() {
 6345|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 6346|       |        let worker = test_worker();
 6347|       |        worker.engine.ctx.with(|ctx| {
 6348|       |            let with_weight: Vec<f64> = ctx
 6349|       |                .eval("__mdmdview_measure_text_native('abc', 12, 700)")
 6350|       |                .expect("with weight");
 6351|       |            let without_weight: Vec<f64> = ctx
 6352|       |                .eval("__mdmdview_measure_text_native('abc', 12, undefined)")
 6353|       |                .expect("without weight");
 6354|       |            assert_eq!(with_weight.len(), 2);
 6355|       |            assert_eq!(without_weight.len(), 2);
 6356|       |        });

 6359|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6360|       |    #[test]
 6361|       |    fn test_map_init_result_variants() {
 6362|       |        // Tests the inlined init-error mapping pattern used in MermaidWorker::new
 6363|       |        let ok: Result<(), String> = Ok(());
 6364|       |        assert!(ok
 6365|       |            .map_err(|err| format!("Mermaid init error: {}", err))
 6366|       |            .is_ok());
 6367|       |        let err: Result<(), String> = Err("oops".to_string());
 6368|       |        let msg = err
 6369|       |            .map_err(|err| format!("Mermaid init error: {}", err))
 6370|       |            .unwrap_err();
 6371|       |        assert!(msg.contains("Mermaid init error: oops"));
 6372|       |    }
