 6376|       |    fn test_format_render_result_variants() {
 6377|       |        let ok = MermaidWorker::format_render_result(Ok("<svg></svg>".to_string()), 10, 5)
 6378|       |            .expect("ok result");
 6379|       |        assert!(ok.contains("<svg"));
 6380|       |
 6381|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::format_render_result(Err("boom".to_string()), 10, 5).unwrap_err();
 6382|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid render error: boom"));
 6383|       |
 6384|       |        let timeout =
 6385|       |            MermaidWorker::format_render_result(Err("late".to_string()), 10, 20).unwrap_err();
 6386|       |        assert_eq!(timeout, "Mermaid render timed out");
 6387|       |    }

 6393|       |
 6394|       |        let job = MermaidRequest {
 6395|       |            svg_key: 1,
 6396|       |            texture_key: "missing".to_string(),
 6397|       |            code: None,
 6398|       |            svg: None,
 6399|       |            width_bucket: 100,
 6400|       |            scale_bucket: MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0),
 6401|       |            viewport_width: 100,
 6402|       |            viewport_height: 100,
 6403|       |            bg: MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(),
 6404|       |            theme: MermaidTheme::Default,
 6405|       |        };
 6406|       |

 6565|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6566|       |    #[test]
 6567|       |    fn test_bbox_validation_helpers() {
 6568|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(10.0, 10.0, 0.0, 0.0));
 6569|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(0.0, 10.0, 0.0, 0.0));
 6570|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(10.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0));
 6571|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(f32::NAN, 10.0, 0.0, 0.0));
 6572|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(10.0, f32::INFINITY, 0.0, 0.0));
 6573|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(10.0, 10.0, f32::NAN, 0.0));
 6574|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(
 6575|       |            10.0,
 6576|       |            10.0,
 6577|       |            0.0,
 6578|       |            f32::INFINITY
 6579|       |        ));
 6580|       |    }

 6582|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6583|       |    #[test]
 6584|       |    fn test_should_resize_bbox_variants() {
 6585|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::should_resize_bbox(
 6586|       |            true, true, 1.0, 1.0, 10.0, 10.0
 6587|       |        ));
 6588|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::should_resize_bbox(
 6589|       |            true, false, 50.0, 50.0, 10.0, 10.0
 6590|       |        ));
 6591|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::should_resize_bbox(
 6592|       |            false, true, 20.0, 5.0, 10.0, 10.0
 6593|       |        ));
 6594|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::should_resize_bbox(
 6595|       |            false, true, 11.0, 11.0, 10.0, 10.0
 6596|       |        ));
 6597|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::should_resize_bbox(
 6598|       |            false, false, 50.0, 50.0, 10.0, 10.0
 6599|       |        ));
 6600|       |    }

 6602|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6603|       |    #[test]
 6604|       |    fn test_process_job_svg_input_rasterize_error() {
 6605|       |        let mut worker = test_worker();
 6606|       |
 6607|       |        let job = MermaidRequest {
 6608|       |            svg_key: 2,
 6609|       |            texture_key: "bad-svg".to_string(),
 6610|       |            code: Some("graph TD; A-->B;".to_string()),
 6611|       |            svg: Some("not svg".to_string()),
 6612|       |            width_bucket: 100,
 6613|       |            scale_bucket: MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0),
 6614|       |            viewport_width: 100,
 6615|       |            viewport_height: 100,
 6616|       |            bg: MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(),
 6617|       |            theme: MermaidTheme::Default,
 6618|       |        };
 6619|       |
 6620|       |        let result = worker.process_job(job);
 6621|       |        assert!(result.svg.is_some());
 6622|       |        assert!(result.rgba.is_none());
 6623|       |        assert!(result.error.is_some());
 6624|       |    }

 6628|       |    fn test_rasterize_svg_adjusts_for_oversized_bbox() {
 6629|       |        let worker = test_worker();
 6630|       |
 6631|       |        let svg = r#"<svg width="100" height="100" viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
 6632|       |<rect x="-50" y="-50" width="200" height="200" fill="red"/>
 6633|       |</svg>"#;
 6634|       |        let (data, w, h) = worker
 6635|       |            .rasterize_svg(
 6636|       |                svg,
 6637|       |                0,
 6638|       |                MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0),
 6639|       |                MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(),
 6640|       |            )
 6641|       |            .expect("rasterize svg");
 6642|       |        assert_eq!((w, h), (208, 208));
 6643|       |        assert_eq!(data.len(), (w as usize) * (h as usize) * 4);
 6644|       |    }

 6693|       |            .rasterize_svg(

 6704|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6705|       |    #[test]
 6706|       |    fn test_rasterize_svg_applies_background_fill() {
 6707|       |        let worker = test_worker();
 6708|       |
 6709|       |        let svg = r#"<svg width="4" height="4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg>"#;
 6710|       |        let bg = [10, 20, 30, 200];
 6711|       |        let (data, w, h) = worker
 6712|       |            .rasterize_svg(svg, 0, MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0), bg)
 6713|       |            .expect("rasterize svg");
 6714|       |        assert_eq!((w, h), (4, 4));
 6715|       |        assert_eq!(data.len(), (w as usize) * (h as usize) * 4);
 6716|       |        let alpha = 200.0_f32 / 255.0;
 6717|       |        let expected_r = (10.0_f32 * alpha).round() as u8;
 6718|       |        let expected_g = (20.0_f32 * alpha).round() as u8;
 6719|       |        let expected_b = (30.0_f32 * alpha).round() as u8;
 6720|       |        assert_eq!(data[0], expected_r);
 6721|       |        assert_eq!(data[1], expected_g);
 6722|       |        assert_eq!(data[2], expected_b);
 6723|       |        assert_eq!(data[3], 200);
 6724|       |    }

 6726|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6727|       |    #[test]
 6728|       |    fn test_process_job_applies_svg_fixups() {
 6729|       |        let mut worker = test_worker();
 6730|       |
 6731|       |        let svg = r#"<svg width="120" height="120" viewBox="0 0 120 120" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
 6732|       |<switch>
 6733|       |  <foreignObject><div>Plan</div></foreignObject>
 6734|       |  <text class="journey-section section-type-0" x="10">Plan</text>
 6735|       |</switch>
 6736|       |<g id="state-root_end-0">
 6737|       |  <circle class="state-end" r="5" width="10" height="10"></circle>
 6738|       |  <circle class="state-start" r="7" width="14" height="14"></circle>
 6739|       |</g>
 6740|       |<rect class="er attributeBoxOdd"></rect>
 6741|       |</svg>"#;
 6742|       |
 6743|       |        let job = MermaidRequest {
 6744|       |            svg_key: 4,
 6745|       |            texture_key: "fixups".to_string(),
 6746|       |            code: None,
 6747|       |            svg: Some(svg.to_string()),
 6748|       |            width_bucket: 0,
 6749|       |            scale_bucket: MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0),
 6750|       |            viewport_width: 120,
 6751|       |            viewport_height: 120,
 6752|       |            bg: MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(),
 6753|       |            theme: MermaidTheme::Default,
 6754|       |        };
 6755|       |
 6756|       |        let result = worker.process_job(job);
 6757|       |        let rendered = result.svg.expect("svg output");
 6758|       |        assert!(!rendered.contains("<switch"));
 6759|       |        assert!(rendered.contains("fill:"));
 6760|       |        assert!(rendered.contains("end-state-inner"));
 6761|       |        assert!(rendered.contains("attributeBoxOdd"));
 6762|       |    }

 6764|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6765|       |    #[test]
 6766|       |    fn test_poll_mermaid_results_handles_variants() {
 6767|       |        let (result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(10);
 6768|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 6769|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 6770|       |
 6771|       |        renderer
 6772|       |            .mermaid_pending
 6773|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6774|       |            .insert("k1".to_string());
 6775|       |        result_tx
 6776|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 6777|       |                svg_key: 1,
 6778|       |                texture_key: "k1".to_string(),
 6779|       |                svg: Some("<svg width=\"1\" height=\"1\"></svg>".to_string()),
 6780|       |                rgba: None,
 6781|       |                size: None,
 6782|       |                error: None,
 6783|       |            })
 6784|       |            .expect("send svg");
 6785|       |        assert!(renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx));
 6786|       |        assert!(renderer.mermaid_svg_cache.borrow_mut().get(&1).is_some());
 6787|       |
 6788|       |        renderer
 6789|       |            .mermaid_pending
 6790|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6791|       |            .insert("k2".to_string());
 6792|       |        result_tx
 6793|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 6794|       |                svg_key: 2,
 6795|       |                texture_key: "k2".to_string(),
 6796|       |                svg: None,
 6797|       |                rgba: Some(vec![0, 0, 0, 0]),
 6798|       |                size: None,
 6799|       |                error: None,
 6800|       |            })
 6801|       |            .expect("send rgba missing size");
 6802|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 6803|       |        assert!(renderer
 6804|       |            .mermaid_texture_errors
 6805|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6806|       |            .get(&"k2".to_string())
 6807|       |            .is_some());
 6808|       |
 6809|       |        renderer
 6810|       |            .mermaid_pending
 6811|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6812|       |            .insert("k3".to_string());
 6813|       |        result_tx
 6814|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 6815|       |                svg_key: 3,
 6816|       |                texture_key: "k3".to_string(),
 6817|       |                svg: None,
 6818|       |                rgba: None,
 6819|       |                size: None,
 6820|       |                error: Some("boom".to_string()),
 6821|       |            })
 6822|       |            .expect("send error");
 6823|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 6824|       |        assert!(renderer.mermaid_errors.borrow_mut().get(&3).is_some());
 6825|       |
 6826|       |        renderer
 6827|       |            .mermaid_pending
 6828|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6829|       |            .insert("k4".to_string());
 6830|       |        result_tx
 6831|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 6832|       |                svg_key: 4,
 6833|       |                texture_key: "k4".to_string(),
 6834|       |                svg: Some("<svg width=\"1\" height=\"1\"></svg>".to_string()),
 6835|       |                rgba: None,
 6836|       |                size: None,
 6837|       |                error: Some("oops".to_string()),
 6838|       |            })
 6839|       |            .expect("send texture error");
 6840|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 6841|       |        assert!(renderer
 6842|       |            .mermaid_texture_errors
 6843|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6844|       |            .get(&"k4".to_string())
 6845|       |            .is_some());
 6846|       |
 6847|       |        renderer
 6848|       |            .mermaid_pending
 6849|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6850|       |            .insert("k5".to_string());
 6851|       |        result_tx
 6852|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 6853|       |                svg_key: 5,
 6854|       |                texture_key: "k5".to_string(),
 6855|       |                svg: None,
 6856|       |                rgba: Some(vec![255, 255, 255, 255]),
 6857|       |                size: Some((1, 1)),
 6858|       |                error: None,
 6859|       |            })
 6860|       |            .expect("send rgba with size");
 6861|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 6862|       |        assert!(renderer
 6863|       |            .mermaid_textures
 6864|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6865|       |            .get(&"k5".to_string())
 6866|       |            .is_some());
 6867|       |    }

 6869|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6870|       |    #[test]
 6871|       |    fn test_format_js_error_variants() {
 6872|       |        let rt = rquickjs::Runtime::new().expect("runtime");
 6873|       |        let ctx = rquickjs::Context::full(&rt).expect("context");
 6874|       |        ctx.with(|ctx| {
 6875|       |            let err = ctx.eval::<(), _>("throw new Error('boom')").unwrap_err();
 6876|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6877|       |            assert!(msg.contains("boom"));
 6878|       |
 6879|       |            let err = ctx
 6880|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error('match'); e.stack = 'match\\nstack'; throw e;")
 6881|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6882|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6883|       |            assert!(msg.contains("match"));
 6884|       |
 6885|       |            let err = ctx
 6886|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error('note'); e.stack = 'stack only'; throw e;")
 6887|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6888|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6889|       |            assert!(!msg.is_empty());
 6890|       |
 6891|       |            let err = ctx
 6892|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error('blank'); e.stack = ' '; throw e;")
 6893|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6894|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6895|       |            assert!(msg.contains("blank"));
 6896|       |
 6897|       |            let err = ctx
 6898|       |                .eval::<(), _>("throw ({ stack: 'stack-only-obj' })")
 6899|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6900|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6901|       |            assert!(!msg.is_empty());
 6902|       |
 6903|       |            let err = ctx
 6904|       |                .eval::<(), _>("throw ({ message: 'message-only-obj' })")
 6905|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6906|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6907|       |            assert!(!msg.is_empty());
 6908|       |
 6909|       |            let err = ctx
 6910|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error(''); e.message = undefined; e.stack = 'stack-only'; throw e;")
 6911|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6912|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6913|       |            assert!(msg.contains("stack-only"));
 6914|       |
 6915|       |            let err = ctx
 6916|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error('solo'); delete e.stack; throw e;")
 6917|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6918|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6919|       |            assert!(msg.contains("solo"));
 6920|       |
 6921|       |            let err = ctx
 6922|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error('solo2'); e.stack = undefined; throw e;")
 6923|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6924|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6925|       |            assert!(msg.contains("solo2"));
 6926|       |
 6927|       |            let err = ctx
 6928|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error('zap'); e.stack = ''; throw e;")
 6929|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6930|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6931|       |            assert!(msg.contains("zap"));
 6932|       |
 6933|       |            let err = ctx
 6934|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error(''); e.message = ''; e.stack = ''; throw e;")
 6935|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6936|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6937|       |            assert!(!msg.is_empty());
 6938|       |
 6939|       |            let err = ctx.eval::<(), _>("throw 'stringy'").unwrap_err();
 6940|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6941|       |            assert_eq!(msg, "stringy");
 6942|       |
 6943|       |            let err = ctx.eval::<(), _>("throw 42").unwrap_err();
 6944|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6945|       |            assert_eq!(msg, "42");
 6946|       |
 6947|       |            let err = ctx.eval::<(), _>("throw 3.5").unwrap_err();
 6948|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6949|       |            assert!(msg.contains("3.5"));
 6950|       |
 6951|       |            let err = ctx.eval::<(), _>("throw true").unwrap_err();
 6952|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6953|       |            assert_eq!(msg, "true");
 6954|       |
 6955|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, rquickjs::Error::Unknown);
 6956|       |            assert!(!msg.is_empty());
 6957|       |
 6958|       |            let err = ctx.eval::<(), _>("throw ({})").unwrap_err();
 6959|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6960|       |            assert!(!msg.is_empty());
 6961|       |        });
 6962|       |    }
 6963|       |
 6964|       |    struct EnvGuard {
 6965|       |        key: &'static str,
 6966|       |        original: Option<String>,
 6967|       |    }
 6968|       |
 6969|       |    impl EnvGuard {
 6970|       |        fn set(key: &'static str, value: &str) -> Self {
 6971|       |            let original = std::env::var(key).ok();
 6972|       |            std::env::set_var(key, value);
 6973|       |            Self { key, original }
 6974|       |        }
 6975|       |    }
 6976|       |
 6977|       |    impl Drop for EnvGuard {
 6978|       |        fn drop(&mut self) {
 6979|       |            if let Some(value) = &self.original {
 6980|       |                std::env::set_var(self.key, value);
 6981|       |            } else {
 6982|       |                std::env::remove_var(self.key);
 6983|       |            }
 6984|       |        }
 6985|       |    }
 6986|       |
 6987|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6988|       |    struct MermaidJsEmptyGuard {
 6989|       |        previous: Option<std::thread::ThreadId>,
 6990|       |    }
 6991|       |
 6992|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6993|       |    impl MermaidJsEmptyGuard {
 6994|       |        fn set(value: bool) -> Self {
 6995|       |            let previous = set_mermaid_js_empty_for_test(value);
 6996|       |            Self { previous }
 6997|       |        }
 6998|       |    }
 6999|       |
 7000|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7001|       |    impl Drop for MermaidJsEmptyGuard {
 7002|       |        fn drop(&mut self) {
 7003|       |            let mut guard = MERMAID_JS_EMPTY_OVERRIDE
 7004|       |                .lock()
 7005|       |                .expect("mermaid js override lock");
 7006|       |            *guard = self.previous;
 7007|       |        }
 7008|       |    }
 7009|       |
 7010|       |    #[test]
 7011|       |    fn test_parse_hex_color() {
 7012|       |        assert_eq!(
 7013|       |            MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("#ff00ff"),
 7014|       |            Some([255, 0, 255, 255])
 7015|       |        );
 7016|       |        assert_eq!(
 7017|       |            MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("11223344"),
 7018|       |            Some([17, 34, 51, 68])
 7019|       |        );
 7020|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("bad").is_none());
 7021|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("GG0000").is_none());
 7022|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("00GG00").is_none());
 7023|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("0000GG").is_none());
 7024|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("GG000000").is_none());
 7025|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("00GG0000").is_none());
 7026|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("0000GG00").is_none());
 7027|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("000000GG").is_none());
 7028|       |    }

 7030|       |    #[test]
 7031|       |    fn test_env_guard_restores_original_value() {
 7032|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 7033|       |        std::env::set_var("MDMDVIEW_TEST_GUARD_ENV", "before");
 7034|       |        {
 7035|       |            let _guard = EnvGuard::set("MDMDVIEW_TEST_GUARD_ENV", "after");
 7036|       |            assert_eq!(
 7037|       |                std::env::var("MDMDVIEW_TEST_GUARD_ENV").ok().as_deref(),
 7038|       |                Some("after")
 7039|       |            );
 7040|       |        }
 7041|       |        assert_eq!(
 7042|       |            std::env::var("MDMDVIEW_TEST_GUARD_ENV").ok().as_deref(),
 7043|       |            Some("before")
 7044|       |        );
 7045|       |        std::env::remove_var("MDMDVIEW_TEST_GUARD_ENV");
 7046|       |    }

 7048|       |    #[test]
 7049|       |    fn test_mermaid_bg_key_and_scale_bucket() {
 7050|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidRenderer::mermaid_bg_key([1, 2, 3, 4]), "01020304");
 7051|       |        assert_eq!(
 7052|       |            MermaidRenderer::mermaid_bg_key([255, 255, 255, 255]),
 7053|       |            "ffffffff"
 7054|       |        );
 7055|       |
 7056|       |        let factor = MermaidRenderer::MERMAID_SCALE_BUCKET_FACTOR;
 7057|       |        assert_eq!(
 7058|       |            MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(0.1),
 7059|       |            (0.5 * factor).round() as u32
 7060|       |        );
 7061|       |        assert_eq!(
 7062|       |            MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(10.0),
 7063|       |            (4.0 * factor).round() as u32
 7064|       |        );
 7065|       |    }

 7067|       |    #[test]
 7068|       |    fn test_mermaid_hash_str_stable_and_distinct() {
 7069|       |        let a = hash_str("alpha");
 7070|       |        let b = hash_str("alpha");
 7071|       |        let c = hash_str("beta");
 7072|       |        assert_eq!(a, b);
 7073|       |        assert_ne!(a, c);
 7074|       |    }

 7079|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7080|       |        let input = test_raw_input(800.0, 600.0);
 7081|       |
 7082|       |        let mut rendered = true;
 7083|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 7084|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 7085|       |                rendered =
 7086|       |                    renderer.render_block(ui, "graph TD; A-->B;", 1.0, 14.0, MermaidTheme::Default);
 7087|       |            });
 7088|       |        });
 7089|       |        assert!(rendered);
 7090|       |    }
 7091|       |
 7092|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7093|       |    #[test]
 7094|       |    fn test_render_block_embedded_missing_js_fallback() {
 7095|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 7096|       |        let _empty = MermaidJsEmptyGuard::set(true);
 7097|       |        let (_tx, rx) = bounded(1);
 7098|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, rx);
 7099|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7100|       |        let input = test_raw_input(800.0, 600.0);
 7101|       |
 7102|       |        let mut rendered = true;
 7103|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 7104|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 7105|       |                rendered =
 7106|       |                    renderer.render_block(ui, "graph TD; A-->B;", 1.0, 14.0, MermaidTheme::Default);
 7107|       |            });
 7108|       |        });
 7109|       |        assert!(rendered);
 7110|       |    }

 7168|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7169|       |    #[test]
 7170|       |    fn test_render_block_uses_cached_texture_scales() {
 7171|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 7172|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 7173|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7174|       |        let input = test_raw_input(240.0, 160.0);
 7175|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 7176|       |        let code = "graph TD; A-->B;";
 7177|       |        let mut rendered_large = false;
 7178|       |        let mut rendered_small = false;
 7179|       |
 7180|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 7181|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 7182|       |                let image = egui::ColorImage::new([2, 2], Color32::WHITE);
 7183|       |                let texture =
 7184|       |                    ui.ctx()
 7185|       |                        .load_texture("mermaid-test", image, egui::TextureOptions::default());
 7186|       |                let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 7187|       |                let make_key = |ui: &egui::Ui| {
 7188|       |                    let width_bucket = MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(ui.available_width());
 7189|       |                    let scale_bucket = MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0);
 7190|       |                    let bg = theme.bg_fill();
 7191|       |                    MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, width_bucket, scale_bucket, bg)
 7192|       |                };
 7193|       |
 7194|       |                let texture_key = make_key(ui);
 7195|       |                renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow_mut().insert(
 7196|       |                    texture_key.clone(),
 7197|       |                    MermaidTextureEntry {
 7198|       |                        texture: texture.clone(),
 7199|       |                        size: [400, 200],
 7200|       |                    },
 7201|       |                );
 7202|       |                rendered_large = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 7203|       |
 7204|       |                let texture_key = make_key(ui);
 7205|       |                renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow_mut().insert(
 7206|       |                    texture_key,
 7207|       |                    MermaidTextureEntry {
 7208|       |                        texture,
 7209|       |                        size: [20, 10],
 7210|       |                    },
 7211|       |                );
 7212|       |                rendered_small = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 7213|       |            });
 7214|       |        });
 7215|       |
 7216|       |        assert!(rendered_large);
 7217|       |        assert!(rendered_small);
 7218|       |    }

 7223|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 7224|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);

 7230|       |            .borrow_mut()
 7231|       |            .insert(svg_key, "boom".to_string());

 7233|       |        let input = test_raw_input(240.0, 160.0);
 7234|       |        let mut rendered = false;

 7243|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7244|       |    #[test]
 7245|       |    fn test_render_block_queue_full_sets_waiting() {
 7246|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 7247|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(1);
 7248|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 7249|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx.clone()), result_rx);
 7250|       |        let request = MermaidRequest {
 7251|       |            svg_key: 1,
 7252|       |            texture_key: "full".to_string(),
 7253|       |            code: Some("graph TD; A-->B;".to_string()),
 7254|       |            svg: None,
 7255|       |            width_bucket: 32,
 7256|       |            scale_bucket: MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0),
 7257|       |            viewport_width: 120,
 7258|       |            viewport_height: 120,
 7259|       |            bg: theme.bg_fill(),
 7260|       |            theme,
 7261|       |        };
 7262|       |        job_tx.send(request).expect("fill queue");
 7263|       |
 7264|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7265|       |        let input = test_raw_input(240.0, 160.0);
 7266|       |        let mut rendered = false;
 7267|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 7268|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 7269|       |                rendered = renderer.render_block(ui, "graph TD; A-->B;", 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 7270|       |            });
 7271|       |        });
 7272|       |        assert!(rendered);
 7273|       |        assert!(renderer.mermaid_frame_pending.get());
 7274|       |        drop(job_rx);
 7275|       |    }

 7299|       |    fn test_render_block_pending_and_width_fallback() {
 7300|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 7301|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(2);
 7302|       |        let (result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(2);
 7303|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 7304|       |        result_tx
 7305|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 7306|       |                svg_key: 99,
 7307|       |                texture_key: "other".to_string(),
 7308|       |                svg: Some("<svg width=\"1\" height=\"1\"></svg>".to_string()),
 7309|       |                rgba: None,
 7310|       |                size: None,
 7311|       |                error: None,
 7312|       |            })
 7313|       |            .expect("send svg");
 7314|       |
 7315|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7316|       |        let input = test_raw_input(200.0, 120.0);
 7317|       |        let code = "timeline\n  title Demo";
 7318|       |        let mut rendered_first = false;
 7319|       |        let mut rendered_second = false;
 7320|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 7321|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 7322|       |                let rect = egui::Rect::from_min_size(egui::pos2(0.0, 0.0), egui::vec2(10.0, 80.0));
 7323|       |                ui.allocate_ui_at_rect(rect, |ui| {
 7324|       |                    rendered_first = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 7325|       |                    rendered_second = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 7326|       |                });
 7327|       |            });
 7328|       |        });
 7329|       |        assert!(rendered_first);
 7330|       |        assert!(rendered_second);
 7331|       |        drop(job_rx);
 7332|       |    }
 7333|       |
 7334|       |    #[test]
 7335|       |    fn test_mermaid_cache_insert_existing_key_and_empty_order() {
 7336|       |        let mut cache = LruCache::new(1);
 7337|       |        cache.insert(1u8, "one".to_string());
 7338|       |        cache.insert(1u8, "uno".to_string());
 7339|       |        assert_eq!(cache.get(&1), Some("uno".to_string()));
 7340|       |        assert!(cache.get(&9).is_none());
 7341|       |
 7342|       |        cache.insert(2u8, "two".to_string());
 7343|       |        assert!(cache.get(&1).is_none());
 7344|       |
 7345|       |        cache.entries.clear();
 7346|       |        cache.entries.insert(2u8, "two".to_string());
 7347|       |        cache.order.clear();
 7348|       |        cache.insert(3u8, "three".to_string());
 7349|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 7350|       |    }

 7507|       |            .find("var dx = t_pos.x - s_pos.x")
 7508|       |            .expect("mindmap dx computed");

 7510|       |            .find("var s_radius = __mdmdview_rect_intersection")
 7511|       |            .expect("mindmap radius computed");

 7523|       |    #[test]
 7524|       |    fn test_flatten_svg_switches_removes_foreignobject() {
 7525|       |        let input = r#"<svg><switch><foreignObject><div>Plan</div></foreignObject><text>Plan</text></switch></svg>"#;
 7526|       |        let output = MermaidWorker::flatten_svg_switches(input).expect("switch flattened");
 7527|       |        assert!(!output.contains("<switch"));
 7528|       |        assert!(!output.contains("foreignObject"));
 7529|       |        assert!(output.contains("<text>Plan</text>"));
 7530|       |    }

 7609|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7610|       |    #[test]
 7611|       |    fn test_patch_mermaid_js_applies_expected_replacements() {
 7612|       |        let js = concat!(
 7613|       |            "var hD=wRe();",
 7614|       |            "FY.prototype={constructor:FY,appendChild:function(i){return this._parent.insertBefore(i,this._next)},insertBefore:function(i,s){return this._parent.insertBefore(i,s)},querySelector:function(i){return this._parent.querySelector(i)},querySelectorAll:function(i){return this._parent.querySelectorAll(i)}};",
 7615|       |            "function FY(i,s){this.ownerDocument=i.ownerDocument,this.namespaceURI=i.namespaceURI,this._next=null,this._parent=i,this.__data__=s}",
 7616|       |            "u.text().split(/(\\s+|<br>)/).reverse()",
 7617|       |            "p=fWe({container:document.getElementById(\"cy\"),style:[{selector:\"edge\",style:{\"curve-style\":\"bezier\"}}]});",
 7618|       |            "p.layout({name:\"cose-bilkent\",quality:\"proof\",styleEnabled:!1,animate:!1}).run(),p.ready(v=>{Xe.info(\"Ready\",v),u(p)})",
 7619|       |            "const se=_.node().getBBox();"
 7620|       |        );
 7621|       |        let output = MermaidWorker::patch_mermaid_js(js);
 7622|       |        assert!(output.contains("sanitize:function"));
 7623|       |        assert!(output.contains("document.body"));
 7624|       |        assert!(output.contains("String(typeof u.text"));
 7625|       |        assert!(output.contains("__mdmdview_cytoscape_stub"));
 7626|       |        assert!(output.contains("breadthfirst"));
 7627|       |        assert!(output.contains("se.width=Math.max"));
 7628|       |    }
 7629|       |

 7634|       |            "p.layout({name:\"cose-bilkent\",quality:\"proof\",styleEnabled:!1,animate:!1}).run()";

 7637|       |    }

 7705|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7706|       |    #[test]
 7707|       |    fn test_replace_and_upsert_attr_paths() {
 7708|       |        let tag = r#"<svg width="10" height="20">"#;
 7709|       |        let replaced = MermaidWorker::replace_attr(tag, "width", "99");
 7710|       |        assert!(replaced.contains("width=\"99\""));
 7711|       |        let unchanged = MermaidWorker::replace_attr(tag, "viewBox", "0 0 1 1");
 7712|       |        assert_eq!(unchanged, tag);
 7713|       |        let upsert_existing = MermaidWorker::upsert_attr(tag, "height", "42");
 7714|       |        assert!(upsert_existing.contains("height=\"42\""));
 7715|       |        let upsert_new = MermaidWorker::upsert_attr(tag, "viewBox", "0 0 1 1");
 7716|       |        assert!(upsert_new.contains("viewBox=\"0 0 1 1\""));
 7717|       |    }

 7723|       |        let stripped = MermaidWorker::strip_svg_attr(svg, "width").expect("width removed");

 7725|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::strip_svg_attr(svg, "viewBox").is_none());
 7726|       |        let inserted = MermaidWorker::insert_svg_attr("<svg></svg>", "viewBox", "0 0 1 1");
 7727|       |        assert!(inserted.contains("viewBox=\"0 0 1 1\""));
 7728|       |    }

 7769|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7770|       |    #[test]
 7771|       |    fn test_parse_viewbox_dims_and_format_dim() {
 7772|       |        assert_eq!(
 7773|       |            MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0 0 100 200"),
 7774|       |            Some((100.0, 200.0))
 7775|       |        );
 7776|       |        assert_eq!(
 7777|       |            MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0,0,100,200"),
 7778|       |            Some((100.0, 200.0))
 7779|       |        );
 7780|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0,0,100,0").is_none());
 7781|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0 0 -1 2").is_none());
 7782|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0 0 NaN 2").is_none());
 7783|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0 0 inf 2").is_none());
 7784|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0 0 2 inf").is_none());
 7785|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("bad").is_none());
 7786|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::format_dim(10.0), "10");
 7787|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::format_dim(10.5), "10.5");
 7788|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::format_dim(0.0), "0");
 7789|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::format_dim(10.123), "10.123");
 7790|       |        let nan = MermaidWorker::format_dim(f32::NAN);
 7791|       |        assert!(!nan.contains('.'));
 7792|       |        assert!(nan.to_lowercase().contains("nan"));
 7793|       |    }

 7907|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7908|       |    #[test]
 7909|       |    fn test_enqueue_mermaid_job_disconnected() {
 7910|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(1);
 7911|       |        drop(job_rx);
 7912|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 7913|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 7914|       |        let request = MermaidRequest {
 7915|       |            svg_key: 1,
 7916|       |            texture_key: "t".to_string(),
 7917|       |            code: Some("graph TD; A-->B;".to_string()),
 7918|       |            svg: None,
 7919|       |            width_bucket: 120,
 7920|       |            scale_bucket: 100,
 7921|       |            viewport_width: 120,
 7922|       |            viewport_height: 120,
 7923|       |            bg: MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(),
 7924|       |            theme: MermaidTheme::Default,
 7925|       |        };
 7926|       |        assert_eq!(
 7927|       |            renderer.enqueue_mermaid_job(request),
 7928|       |            Err(MermaidEnqueueError::Disconnected)
 7929|       |        );
 7930|       |    }
 7931|       |
 7932|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7933|       |    #[test]
 7934|       |    fn test_render_block_enqueues_cached_svg() {
 7935|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 7936|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(1);
 7937|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 7938|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 7939|       |        let code = "graph TD; A-->B;";
 7940|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 7941|       |        renderer
 7942|       |            .mermaid_svg_cache
 7943|       |            .borrow_mut()
 7944|       |            .insert(svg_key, "<svg></svg>".to_string());
 7945|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7946|       |        let input = test_raw_input(240.0, 120.0);
 7947|       |        let mut rendered = false;
 7948|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 7949|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 7950|       |                rendered = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 7951|       |            });
 7952|       |        });
 7953|       |        assert!(rendered);
 7954|       |        let request = job_rx
 7955|       |            .recv_timeout(std::time::Duration::from_secs(1))
 7956|       |            .expect("request");
 7957|       |        assert!(request.svg.is_some());
 7958|       |        assert!(request.code.is_none());
 7959|       |    }
 7960|       |
 7961|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7962|       |    #[test]
 7963|       |    fn test_spawn_mermaid_workers_reports_init_error() {
 7964|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 7965|       |        force_mermaid_worker_init_error_once();
 7966|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(1);
 7967|       |        let (result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 7968|       |        let handles = MermaidRenderer::spawn_mermaid_workers(job_rx, result_tx);
 7969|       |        let request = MermaidRequest {
 7970|       |            svg_key: 2,
 7971|       |            texture_key: "t".to_string(),
 7972|       |            code: Some("graph TD; A-->B;".to_string()),
 7973|       |            svg: None,
 7974|       |            width_bucket: 120,
 7975|       |            scale_bucket: 100,
 7976|       |            viewport_width: 120,
 7977|       |            viewport_height: 120,
 7978|       |            bg: MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(),
 7979|       |            theme: MermaidTheme::Default,
 7980|       |        };
 7981|       |        job_tx.send(request).expect("send");
 7982|       |        let result = result_rx
 7983|       |            .recv_timeout(std::time::Duration::from_secs(1))
 7984|       |            .expect("result");
 7985|       |        assert!(result.error.is_some());
 7986|       |        drop(job_tx);
 7987|       |        for handle in handles {
 7988|       |            let _ = handle.join();
 7989|       |        }
 7990|       |    }
 7991|       |
 7992|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7993|       |    #[test]
 7994|       |    fn test_spawn_mermaid_workers_reports_spawn_error() {
 7995|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 7996|       |        force_mermaid_thread_spawn_error_once();
 7997|       |        let (_job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(1);
 7998|       |        let (result_tx, _result_rx) = bounded(1);
 7999|       |        let expected_count = MermaidRenderer::mermaid_worker_count();
 8000|       |        let handles = MermaidRenderer::spawn_mermaid_workers(job_rx, result_tx);
 8001|       |        // One spawn was forced to fail, so we should have fewer than expected
 8002|       |        assert!(
 8003|       |            handles.len() < expected_count,
 8004|       |            "expected fewer than {} handles due to forced spawn error, got {}",
 8005|       |            expected_count,
 8006|       |            handles.len()
 8007|       |        );
 8008|       |    }

 8010|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8011|       |    #[test]
 8012|       |    fn test_mermaid_worker_init_error_stages() {
 8013|       |        let fontdb = test_fontdb();
 8014|       |
 8015|       |        force_mermaid_init_error_once(1);
 8016|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::new(0, Arc::clone(&fontdb))
 8017|       |            .err()
 8018|       |            .expect("stage 1 err");
 8019|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid text measure init error"));
 8020|       |
 8021|       |        force_mermaid_init_error_once(2);
 8022|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::new(0, Arc::clone(&fontdb))
 8023|       |            .err()
 8024|       |            .expect("stage 2 err");
 8025|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid text measure init error"));
 8026|       |
 8027|       |        force_mermaid_init_error_once(3);
 8028|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::new(0, Arc::clone(&fontdb))
 8029|       |            .err()
 8030|       |            .expect("stage 3 err");
 8031|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid DOM shim"));
 8032|       |
 8033|       |        force_mermaid_init_error_once(4);
 8034|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::new(0, Arc::clone(&fontdb))
 8035|       |            .err()
 8036|       |            .expect("stage 4 err");
 8037|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid JS"));
 8038|       |
 8039|       |        force_mermaid_init_error_once(5);
 8040|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::new(0, Arc::clone(&fontdb))
 8041|       |            .err()
 8042|       |            .expect("stage 5 err");
 8043|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid init"));
 8044|       |    }

 8057|       |    #[test]
 8058|       |    fn test_mermaid_runtime_flag_mismatch_restores() {
 8059|       |        let handle = std::thread::spawn(|| {
 8060|       |            force_mermaid_runtime_error_once();
 8061|       |        });
 8062|       |        handle.join().expect("flag thread");
 8063|       |
 8064|       |        let _ = runtime_new_for_test().expect("runtime ok");
 8065|       |
 8066|       |        let mut guard = FORCE_MERMAID_RUNTIME_ERROR
 8067|       |            .lock()
 8068|       |            .expect("mermaid runtime flag lock");
 8069|       |        *guard = None;
 8070|       |    }

 8138|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8139|       |    #[test]
 8140|       |    fn test_svg_helper_early_returns() {
 8141|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::normalize_svg_size("<svg"), "<svg");
 8142|       |        assert_eq!(
 8143|       |            MermaidWorker::normalize_svg_size("<svg viewBox=\"bad\">"),
 8144|       |            "<svg viewBox=\"bad\">"
 8145|       |        );
 8146|       |        assert_eq!(
 8147|       |            MermaidWorker::replace_attr("<svg width=\"100", "width", "200"),
 8148|       |            "<svg width=\"100"
 8149|       |        );
 8150|       |        assert_eq!(
 8151|       |            MermaidWorker::upsert_attr("<svg width=\"100\"", "height", "200"),
 8152|       |            "<svg width=\"100\""
 8153|       |        );
 8154|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::flatten_svg_switches("<switch").is_none());
 8155|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::fix_journey_section_text("<text journey-section", "#fff").is_none());
 8156|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::fix_state_end_circles("<svg><g class=\"state-end\"").is_none());
 8157|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::fix_state_end_circles("<svg><g class=\"state-end\"></g").is_none());
 8158|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::fix_er_attribute_fills("<rect class=\"attributeBoxOdd\"").is_none());
 8159|       |        assert_eq!(
 8160|       |            MermaidWorker::replace_svg_attr("<svg>", "width", "1"),
 8161|       |            "<svg>"
 8162|       |        );
 8163|       |        assert_eq!(
 8164|       |            MermaidWorker::replace_svg_attr("<svg width=\"100>", "width", "1"),
 8165|       |            "<svg width=\"100>"
 8166|       |        );
 8167|       |        assert_eq!(
 8168|       |            MermaidWorker::insert_svg_attr("no svg", "width", "1"),
 8169|       |            "no svg"
 8170|       |        );
 8171|       |    }

 8180|       |        let expected = "<text><tspan font-style=\"italic\">italic</tspan></text>";
 8181|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input), expected);
 8182|       |    }

 8234|       |    #[test]
 8235|       |    fn test_html_to_tspan_unknown_tag_passthrough() {
 8236|       |        // Unknown tags (like <span>, or SVG elements like <tspan>) pass through unchanged
 8237|       |        // This is essential to preserve existing SVG structure
 8238|       |        let input = "<text>&lt;span&gt;text&lt;/span&gt;</text>";
 8239|       |        let expected = "<text><span>text</span></text>";
 8240|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input), expected);
 8241|       |    }
 8242|       |
 8243|       |    #[test]
 8244|       |    fn test_html_to_tspan_preserves_existing_svg_tspan() {
 8245|       |        // Critical: existing SVG tspan elements must be preserved unchanged
 8246|       |        // This is the real-world case from Mermaid output
 8247|       |        let input =
 8248|       |            r#"<text><tspan xml:space="preserve" dy="1em" x="0" class="row">Label</tspan></text>"#;
 8249|       |        let expected =
 8250|       |            r#"<text><tspan xml:space="preserve" dy="1em" x="0" class="row">Label</tspan></text>"#;
 8251|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input), expected);
 8252|       |    }
 8253|       |
 8254|       |    #[test]
 8255|       |    fn test_html_to_tspan_mixed_svg_and_html_tags() {
 8256|       |        // HTML tags inside existing SVG tspan should still be converted
 8257|       |        let input = r#"<text><tspan dy="1em">&lt;b&gt;bold&lt;/b&gt;</tspan></text>"#;
 8258|       |        let result = MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input);
 8259|       |        assert!(result.contains(r#"<tspan dy="1em">"#)); // Preserve outer tspan
 8260|       |        assert!(result.contains(r#"font-weight="bold""#)); // Convert HTML bold
 8261|       |    }

 8320|       |    #[test]
 8321|       |    fn test_html_to_tspan_mismatched_tags() {
 8322|       |        // <b>a<i>b</b>c</i> - close b while i is open
 8323|       |        let input = "<text>&lt;b&gt;a&lt;i&gt;b&lt;/b&gt;c&lt;/i&gt;</text>";
 8324|       |        // Expected: close i and b at </b>, reopen i for c, close i at </i>
 8325|       |        let result = MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input);
 8326|       |        // Should contain proper tspan nesting
 8327|       |        assert!(result.contains("<tspan font-weight=\"bold\">"));
 8328|       |        assert!(result.contains("<tspan font-style=\"italic\">"));
 8329|       |        // Should not contain escaped tags
 8330|       |        assert!(!result.contains("&lt;b&gt;"));
 8331|       |        assert!(!result.contains("&lt;i&gt;"));
 8332|       |    }

 8355|       |    #[test]
 8356|       |    fn test_html_to_tspan_preserves_text_attributes() {
 8357|       |        let input = "<text x=\"10\" y=\"20\">&lt;b&gt;bold&lt;/b&gt;</text>";
 8358|       |        let expected = "<text x=\"10\" y=\"20\"><tspan font-weight=\"bold\">bold</tspan></text>";
 8359|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input), expected);
 8360|       |    }

 8366|       |        let result = MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input);
 8367|       |        // The inner tspan content should be converted

 8445|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8446|       |    #[test]
 8447|       |    fn test_release_gpu_textures_preserves_svg_cache() {
 8448|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 8449|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 8450|       |
 8451|       |        // Create a test texture and add to texture cache
 8452|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8453|       |        let input = test_raw_input(800.0, 600.0);
 8454|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8455|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8456|       |                let image = egui::ColorImage::new([2, 2], Color32::WHITE);
 8457|       |                let texture =
 8458|       |                    ui.ctx()
 8459|       |                        .load_texture("test-mermaid", image, egui::TextureOptions::default());
 8460|       |
 8461|       |                // Insert into texture cache
 8462|       |                renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow_mut().insert(
 8463|       |                    "test-texture-key".to_string(),
 8464|       |                    MermaidTextureEntry {
 8465|       |                        texture,
 8466|       |                        size: [100, 100],
 8467|       |                    },
 8468|       |                );
 8469|       |            });
 8470|       |        });
 8471|       |
 8472|       |        // Insert into SVG cache
 8473|       |        let svg_key = hash_str("graph TD; A-->B;");
 8474|       |        renderer
 8475|       |            .mermaid_svg_cache
 8476|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8477|       |            .insert(svg_key, "<svg>test</svg>".to_string());
 8478|       |
 8479|       |        // Verify both caches are populated
 8480|       |        assert_eq!(renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow().len(), 1);
 8481|       |        assert_eq!(renderer.mermaid_svg_cache.borrow().len(), 1);
 8482|       |
 8483|       |        // Call release_gpu_textures
 8484|       |        renderer.release_gpu_textures();
 8485|       |
 8486|       |        // Assert texture cache is EMPTY
 8487|       |        assert_eq!(renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow().len(), 0);
 8488|       |
 8489|       |        // Assert SVG cache is NOT EMPTY (still has entries)
 8490|       |        assert_eq!(renderer.mermaid_svg_cache.borrow().len(), 1);
 8491|       |    }

 8495|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8496|       |    #[test]
 8497|       |    fn test_parse_width_from_texture_key() {
 8498|       |        let key = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(0xABCD, 320, 100, [0, 0, 0, 255]);
 8499|       |        assert_eq!(
 8500|       |            MermaidRenderer::parse_width_from_texture_key(&key),
 8501|       |            Some(320)
 8502|       |        );
 8503|       |
 8504|       |        let key2 = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(0x1234, 1024, 200, [255, 255, 255, 255]);
 8505|       |        assert_eq!(
 8506|       |            MermaidRenderer::parse_width_from_texture_key(&key2),
 8507|       |            Some(1024)
 8508|       |        );
 8509|       |
 8510|       |        // Malformed keys
 8511|       |        assert_eq!(
 8512|       |            MermaidRenderer::parse_width_from_texture_key("no-w-here"),
 8513|       |            None
 8514|       |        );
 8515|       |        assert_eq!(
 8516|       |            MermaidRenderer::parse_width_from_texture_key("mermaid:abc:wNOT_A_NUM:s100:bg00000000"),
 8517|       |            None
 8518|       |        );
 8519|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidRenderer::parse_width_from_texture_key(":w32"), None);
 8520|       |        // no trailing ':'
 8521|       |    }

 8523|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8524|       |    #[test]
 8525|       |    fn test_latest_texture_index_updated_on_store() {
 8526|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 8527|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 8528|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8529|       |        let input = test_raw_input(800.0, 600.0);
 8530|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8531|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8532|       |                let image = egui::ColorImage::new([2, 2], Color32::WHITE);
 8533|       |                let tex =
 8534|       |                    ui.ctx()
 8535|       |                        .load_texture("test-latest", image, egui::TextureOptions::default());
 8536|       |
 8537|       |                let svg_key: u64 = 42;
 8538|       |                renderer.store_mermaid_texture("key_v1", tex.clone(), [2, 2], svg_key);
 8539|       |                assert_eq!(
 8540|       |                    renderer.mermaid_latest_texture.borrow().get(&svg_key),
 8541|       |                    Some(&"key_v1".to_string())
 8542|       |                );
 8543|       |
 8544|       |                renderer.store_mermaid_texture("key_v2", tex.clone(), [4, 4], svg_key);
 8545|       |                assert_eq!(
 8546|       |                    renderer.mermaid_latest_texture.borrow().get(&svg_key),
 8547|       |                    Some(&"key_v2".to_string())
 8548|       |                );
 8549|       |            });
 8550|       |        });
 8551|       |    }
 8552|       |
 8553|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8554|       |    #[test]
 8555|       |    fn test_stale_result_skips_gpu_upload() {
 8556|       |        let (result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(10);
 8557|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 8558|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8559|       |
 8560|       |        let svg_key: u64 = 100;
 8561|       |        let texture_key_old = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, 320, 100, [0, 0, 0, 255]);
 8562|       |        let _texture_key_new = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, 640, 100, [0, 0, 0, 255]);
 8563|       |
 8564|       |        // Set wanted bucket to 640 (different from result's 320)
 8565|       |        renderer
 8566|       |            .mermaid_wanted_bucket
 8567|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8568|       |            .insert(svg_key, 640);
 8569|       |
 8570|       |        renderer
 8571|       |            .mermaid_pending
 8572|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8573|       |            .insert(texture_key_old.clone());
 8574|       |
 8575|       |        result_tx
 8576|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 8577|       |                svg_key,
 8578|       |                texture_key: texture_key_old.clone(),
 8579|       |                svg: Some("<svg>test</svg>".to_string()),
 8580|       |                rgba: Some(vec![255, 255, 255, 255]),
 8581|       |                size: Some((1, 1)),
 8582|       |                error: None,
 8583|       |            })
 8584|       |            .expect("send");
 8585|       |
 8586|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 8587|       |
 8588|       |        // SVG should be cached (always cached regardless of staleness)
 8589|       |        assert!(renderer
 8590|       |            .mermaid_svg_cache
 8591|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8592|       |            .get(&svg_key)
 8593|       |            .is_some());
 8594|       |
 8595|       |        // Texture should NOT be uploaded (stale result)
 8596|       |        assert!(renderer
 8597|       |            .mermaid_textures
 8598|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8599|       |            .get(&texture_key_old)
 8600|       |            .is_none());
 8601|       |
 8602|       |        // Pending should be cleared
 8603|       |        assert!(!renderer.mermaid_pending.borrow().contains(&texture_key_old));
 8604|       |    }
 8605|       |
 8606|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8607|       |    #[test]
 8608|       |    fn test_stale_result_caches_svg() {
 8609|       |        let (result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(10);
 8610|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 8611|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8612|       |
 8613|       |        let svg_key: u64 = 200;
 8614|       |        let texture_key = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, 320, 100, [0, 0, 0, 255]);
 8615|       |
 8616|       |        // Wanted bucket differs from result
 8617|       |        renderer
 8618|       |            .mermaid_wanted_bucket
 8619|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8620|       |            .insert(svg_key, 512);
 8621|       |
 8622|       |        renderer
 8623|       |            .mermaid_pending
 8624|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8625|       |            .insert(texture_key.clone());
 8626|       |
 8627|       |        result_tx
 8628|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 8629|       |                svg_key,
 8630|       |                texture_key: texture_key.clone(),
 8631|       |                svg: Some("<svg>stale-but-cached</svg>".to_string()),
 8632|       |                rgba: None,
 8633|       |                size: None,
 8634|       |                error: None,
 8635|       |            })
 8636|       |            .expect("send");
 8637|       |
 8638|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 8639|       |
 8640|       |        // SVG cached even for stale result
 8641|       |        let cached_svg = renderer.mermaid_svg_cache.borrow_mut().get(&svg_key);
 8642|       |        assert_eq!(cached_svg, Some("<svg>stale-but-cached</svg>".to_string()));
 8643|       |    }

 8645|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8646|       |    #[test]
 8647|       |    fn test_stale_result_caches_error() {
 8648|       |        let (result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(10);
 8649|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 8650|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8651|       |
 8652|       |        let svg_key: u64 = 300;
 8653|       |        let texture_key = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, 320, 100, [0, 0, 0, 255]);
 8654|       |
 8655|       |        // Wanted bucket differs
 8656|       |        renderer
 8657|       |            .mermaid_wanted_bucket
 8658|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8659|       |            .insert(svg_key, 640);
 8660|       |
 8661|       |        renderer
 8662|       |            .mermaid_pending
 8663|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8664|       |            .insert(texture_key.clone());
 8665|       |
 8666|       |        // Send a result with error but no SVG (QuickJS failure)
 8667|       |        result_tx
 8668|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 8669|       |                svg_key,
 8670|       |                texture_key: texture_key.clone(),
 8671|       |                svg: None,
 8672|       |                rgba: None,
 8673|       |                size: None,
 8674|       |                error: Some("QuickJS crashed".to_string()),
 8675|       |            })
 8676|       |            .expect("send");
 8677|       |
 8678|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 8679|       |
 8680|       |        // Error should be cached even for stale result (prevents infinite re-render)
 8681|       |        assert!(renderer.mermaid_errors.borrow_mut().get(&svg_key).is_some());
 8682|       |    }

 8684|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8685|       |    #[test]
 8686|       |    fn test_first_render_no_debounce_delay() {
 8687|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(4);
 8688|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(4);
 8689|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 8690|       |
 8691|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 8692|       |        let code = "graph TD; First-->Render;";
 8693|       |
 8694|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8695|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 8696|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8697|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8698|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8699|       |            });
 8700|       |        });
 8701|       |
 8702|       |        // Job should be enqueued immediately (no debounce on first render)
 8703|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 8704|       |
 8705|       |        // Debounce entry should exist after successful enqueue
 8706|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 8707|       |        assert!(renderer
 8708|       |            .mermaid_width_debounce
 8709|       |            .borrow()
 8710|       |            .contains_key(&svg_key));
 8711|       |
 8712|       |        drop(job_rx);
 8713|       |    }
 8714|       |
 8715|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8716|       |    #[test]
 8717|       |    fn test_first_render_queue_full_no_debounce_entry() {
 8718|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(1);
 8719|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 8720|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx.clone()), result_rx);
 8721|       |
 8722|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 8723|       |
 8724|       |        // Fill the queue first
 8725|       |        let filler = MermaidRequest {
 8726|       |            svg_key: 1,
 8727|       |            texture_key: "filler".to_string(),
 8728|       |            code: Some("graph TD; Fill-->Queue;".to_string()),
 8729|       |            svg: None,
 8730|       |            width_bucket: 32,
 8731|       |            scale_bucket: MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0),
 8732|       |            viewport_width: 120,
 8733|       |            viewport_height: 120,
 8734|       |            bg: theme.bg_fill(),
 8735|       |            theme,
 8736|       |        };
 8737|       |        job_tx.send(filler).expect("fill queue");
 8738|       |
 8739|       |        let code = "graph TD; New-->Diagram;";
 8740|       |
 8741|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8742|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 8743|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8744|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8745|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8746|       |            });
 8747|       |        });
 8748|       |
 8749|       |        // No debounce entry should be created on QueueFull
 8750|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 8751|       |        assert!(!renderer
 8752|       |            .mermaid_width_debounce
 8753|       |            .borrow()
 8754|       |            .contains_key(&svg_key));
 8755|       |
 8756|       |        drop(job_rx);
 8757|       |    }
 8758|       |
 8759|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8760|       |    #[test]
 8761|       |    fn test_debounce_missing_timer_is_reinitialized() {
 8762|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(16);
 8763|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(16);
 8764|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 8765|       |
 8766|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 8767|       |        let code = "graph TD; MissingTimer-->Reset;";
 8768|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 8769|       |
 8770|       |        renderer.mermaid_width_debounce.borrow_mut().insert(
 8771|       |            svg_key,
 8772|       |            WidthDebounce {
 8773|       |                last_enqueued_bucket: MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(400.0),
 8774|       |                last_seen_bucket: MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(400.0),
 8775|       |                bucket_changed_at: None,
 8776|       |            },
 8777|       |        );
 8778|       |
 8779|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8780|       |        let input = test_raw_input(700.0, 300.0);
 8781|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8782|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8783|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8784|       |            });
 8785|       |        });
 8786|       |
 8787|       |        let debounce = renderer.mermaid_width_debounce.borrow();
 8788|       |        let entry = debounce.get(&svg_key).expect("debounce entry");
 8789|       |        assert_eq!(entry.last_seen_bucket, MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(700.0));
 8790|       |        assert!(entry.bucket_changed_at.is_some());
 8791|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 0);
 8792|       |
 8793|       |        drop(job_rx);
 8794|       |    }
 8795|       |
 8796|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8797|       |    #[test]
 8798|       |    fn test_debounce_missing_timer_prefers_stale_texture_when_available() {
 8799|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(16);
 8800|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(16);
 8801|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 8802|       |
 8803|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 8804|       |        let code = "graph TD; Stale-->Shown;";
 8805|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 8806|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8807|       |
 8808|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 8809|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8810|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8811|       |                let width_bucket = MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(ui.available_width());
 8812|       |                let scale_bucket = MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0);
 8813|       |                let texture_key = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(
 8814|       |                    svg_key,
 8815|       |                    width_bucket,
 8816|       |                    scale_bucket,
 8817|       |                    theme.bg_fill(),
 8818|       |                );
 8819|       |                let image = egui::ColorImage::new([2, 2], Color32::WHITE);
 8820|       |                let texture = ui.ctx().load_texture(
 8821|       |                    "mermaid-stale-during-debounce",
 8822|       |                    image,
 8823|       |                    egui::TextureOptions::default(),
 8824|       |                );
 8825|       |
 8826|       |                renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow_mut().insert(
 8827|       |                    texture_key.clone(),
 8828|       |                    MermaidTextureEntry {
 8829|       |                        texture,
 8830|       |                        size: [640, 320],
 8831|       |                    },
 8832|       |                );
 8833|       |                renderer
 8834|       |                    .mermaid_latest_texture
 8835|       |                    .borrow_mut()
 8836|       |                    .insert(svg_key, texture_key);
 8837|       |                renderer.mermaid_width_debounce.borrow_mut().insert(
 8838|       |                    svg_key,
 8839|       |                    WidthDebounce {
 8840|       |                        last_enqueued_bucket: width_bucket,
 8841|       |                        last_seen_bucket: width_bucket,
 8842|       |                        bucket_changed_at: None,
 8843|       |                    },
 8844|       |                );
 8845|       |            });
 8846|       |        });
 8847|       |
 8848|       |        let input2 = test_raw_input(700.0, 300.0);
 8849|       |        let mut rendered = false;
 8850|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input2, |ctx| {
 8851|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8852|       |                rendered = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8853|       |            });
 8854|       |        });
 8855|       |
 8856|       |        assert!(rendered);
 8857|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 0);
 8858|       |        assert!(renderer
 8859|       |            .mermaid_width_debounce
 8860|       |            .borrow()
 8861|       |            .get(&svg_key)
 8862|       |            .and_then(|entry| entry.bucket_changed_at)
 8863|       |            .is_some());
 8864|       |
 8865|       |        drop(job_rx);
 8866|       |    }
 8867|       |
 8868|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8869|       |    #[test]
 8870|       |    fn test_debounce_suppresses_enqueue_during_resize() {
 8871|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(16);
 8872|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(16);
 8873|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 8874|       |
 8875|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 8876|       |        let code = "graph TD; A-->B;";
 8877|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 8878|       |
 8879|       |        // First render at width 400 — should enqueue immediately
 8880|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8881|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 8882|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8883|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8884|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8885|       |            });
 8886|       |        });
 8887|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 8888|       |
 8889|       |        // Simulate width change to 600 (different bucket) within debounce window
 8890|       |        let input2 = test_raw_input(600.0, 300.0);
 8891|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input2, |ctx| {
 8892|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8893|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8894|       |            });
 8895|       |        });
 8896|       |
 8897|       |        // Should NOT have enqueued a second job (debounce active)
 8898|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 8899|       |
 8900|       |        // Debounce entry should still point to the first enqueued width.
 8901|       |        // The second render at 600px was suppressed by debounce.
 8902|       |        let debounce = renderer.mermaid_width_debounce.borrow();
 8903|       |        let entry = debounce.get(&svg_key).expect("debounce entry should exist");
 8904|       |        // last_seen_bucket should have moved to the new width
 8905|       |        assert_ne!(entry.last_seen_bucket, entry.last_enqueued_bucket);
 8906|       |
 8907|       |        drop(job_rx);
 8908|       |    }

 8911|       |    #[test]
 8912|       |    fn test_debounce_fires_after_cooldown() {
 8913|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(16);
 8914|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(16);
 8915|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 8916|       |
 8917|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 8918|       |        let code = "graph TD; C-->D;";
 8919|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 8920|       |
 8921|       |        // First render at width 400
 8922|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8923|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 8924|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8925|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8926|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8927|       |            });
 8928|       |        });
 8929|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 8930|       |
 8931|       |        // Simulate width change to 600 — triggers debounce
 8932|       |        let input2 = test_raw_input(600.0, 300.0);
 8933|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input2, |ctx| {
 8934|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8935|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8936|       |            });
 8937|       |        });
 8938|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1); // Still just 1 (debounced)
 8939|       |
 8940|       |        // Force the debounce timer to appear expired by backdating bucket_changed_at
 8941|       |        {
 8942|       |            let mut debounce = renderer.mermaid_width_debounce.borrow_mut();
 8943|       |            let entry = debounce.get_mut(&svg_key).unwrap();
 8944|       |            entry.bucket_changed_at = Some(
 8945|       |                Instant::now() - std::time::Duration::from_millis(MERMAID_RESIZE_DEBOUNCE_MS + 50),
 8946|       |            );
 8947|       |        }
 8948|       |
 8949|       |        // Re-render at width 600 — debounce should have expired, enqueue fires
 8950|       |        let input3 = test_raw_input(600.0, 300.0);
 8951|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input3, |ctx| {
 8952|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8953|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8954|       |            });
 8955|       |        });
 8956|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 2); // Now 2 — debounce expired
 8957|       |
 8958|       |        drop(job_rx);
 8959|       |    }

 8998|       |    #[test]
 8999|       |    fn test_debounce_resets_on_continued_resize() {
 9000|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(16);
 9001|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(16);
 9002|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 9003|       |
 9004|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 9005|       |        let code = "graph TD; E-->F;";
 9006|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 9007|       |
 9008|       |        // First render at width 400
 9009|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 9010|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 9011|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 9012|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 9013|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 9014|       |            });
 9015|       |        });
 9016|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 9017|       |
 9018|       |        // Width change A?B
 9019|       |        let input2 = test_raw_input(500.0, 300.0);
 9020|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input2, |ctx| {
 9021|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 9022|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 9023|       |            });
 9024|       |        });
 9025|       |        let changed_at_b = renderer
 9026|       |            .mermaid_width_debounce
 9027|       |            .borrow()
 9028|       |            .get(&svg_key)
 9029|       |            .unwrap()
 9030|       |            .bucket_changed_at
 9031|       |            .unwrap();
 9032|       |
 9033|       |        // Width change B?C — timer should reset
 9034|       |        std::thread::sleep(std::time::Duration::from_millis(10));
 9035|       |        let input3 = test_raw_input(700.0, 300.0);
 9036|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input3, |ctx| {
 9037|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 9038|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 9039|       |            });
 9040|       |        });
 9041|       |        let changed_at_c = renderer
 9042|       |            .mermaid_width_debounce
 9043|       |            .borrow()
 9044|       |            .get(&svg_key)
 9045|       |            .unwrap()
 9046|       |            .bucket_changed_at
 9047|       |            .unwrap();
 9048|       |
 9049|       |        // Timer was reset on B?C transition
 9050|       |        assert!(changed_at_c > changed_at_b);
 9051|       |
 9052|       |        // Still only 1 job enqueued (all debounced)
 9053|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 9054|       |
 9055|       |        drop(job_rx);
 9056|       |    }
